articles.title: Weak-to-Strong Generalization via Direct On-Policy Distillation
articles.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) is a powerful recipe for improving language-model reasoning, but it is expensive to repeat on every new strong model because the target model must generate many rollouts during training. As models scale, post-training itself becomes a bottleneck. We study a weak-to-strong alternative: run RL on a smaller model where rollouts are cheaper, then reuse what that RL run learned to improve a stronger target model. Directly distilling the post-RL weak teacher is not enough, because the teacher's final policy mixes useful RL gains with the limitations of the smaller model. We propose Direct On-Policy Distillation (Direct-OPD), which transfers the teacher's RL-induced policy shift instead. Direct-OPD compares the post-RL teacher with its own pre-RL reference and treats their log-ratio as a dense implicit reward for the student. In plain terms, the checkpoint pair tells us which actions RL made the weak model more or less likely to take, and Direct-OPD applies that signal on the stronger student's own on-policy states. This directly reuses the weak model's RL supervision signal without training an explicit reward model or running sparse-reward RL on the target model. Empirically, Direct-OPD consistently leverages weaker teachers to improve stronger target models; notably, it boosts Qwen3-1.7B from 48.3% to 62.4% on AIME 2024 in just 4 hours on 8 A100 GPUs. It outperforms step-matched direct RL and enables the sequential composition of multiple policy shifts. Our results show that RL outcomes can be reused across model scales as implicit reward signals, not merely as final models to imitate.
articles.titleCn: 通过直接策略蒸馏实现弱到强的泛化
articles.abstractCn: 带可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）是提升语言模型推理能力的有效方法，但因其训练过程中目标模型需生成大量 rollout 而成本高昂，难以在新强模型上重复使用。随着模型规模扩大，训练后的优化本身也成为一个瓶颈。我们研究了一种从弱到强的替代方案：在成本更低的较小模型上运行强化学习，然后将该 RL 运行学到的知识用于改进更强的目标模型。直接蒸馏 RL 后的弱教师并不足够，因为教师的最终策略混合了有用的 RL 增益与较小模型的局限性。我们提出了直接策略蒸馏（Direct-OPD），该方法转移教师因 RL 引起的策略变化。Direct-OPD 将 RL 后的教师与其自身的 RL 前参考进行比较，并将它们的对数比视为学生的密集隐式奖励。通俗地说，检查点对告诉我们 RL 哪些动作使弱模型更可能或更不可能执行，而 Direct-OPD 将该信号应用于更强学生的策略状态。这直接复用了弱模型的 RL 监督信号，无需训练显式奖励模型或对目标模型运行稀疏奖励强化学习。实证结果表明，Direct-OPD 始终利用弱教师提升强目标模型；值得注意的是，它在 8 块 A100 GPU 上仅用 4 小时就将 Qwen3-1.7B 在 AIME 2024 上的表现从 48.3% 提升至 62.4%。该方法优于步进匹配的直接强化学习，并支持多个策略变化的顺序组合。我们的结果表明，RL 结果可以作为隐式奖励信号跨模型规模重用，而不仅仅是作为模仿的最终模型。

articles.title: LLM-as-a-Verifier: A General-Purpose Verification Framework
articles.abstract: Scaling pre-training, post-training, and test-time compute have become the central paradigms for improving the capabilities of LLMs. In this work, we identify verification, the ability to determine the correctness of a solution, as a new scaling axis. To unlock this and demonstrate its effectiveness, we introduce LLM-as-a-Verifier, a general-purpose verification framework that provides fine-grained feedback for agentic tasks without requiring additional training. Unlike standard LM judges that prompt LLMs to produce discrete scores for candidate solutions, LLM-as-a-Verifier computes the expectation over the distribution of scoring token logits to generate continuous scores. This probabilistic formulation enables verification to scale along multiple dimensions: (1) score granularity, (2) repeated evaluation, and (3) criteria decomposition. In particular, we show that scaling the scoring granularity leads to better separation between positive and negative solutions, resulting in more calibrated comparisons. Moreover, scaling repeated evaluation and criteria decomposition consistently lead to additional gains in verification accuracy through variance and complexity reduction. We further introduce a cost-efficient ranking algorithm for selecting the best solution among candidates using the verifier's continuous scores. LLM-as-a-Verifier achieves state-of-the-art performance on Terminal-Bench V2 (86.5%), SWE-Bench Verified (78.2%), RoboRewardBench (87.4%), and MedAgentBench (73.3%). Beyond verification, the fine-grained signals from LLM-as-a-Verifier can also serve as a proxy for estimating task progress. We build an extension for Claude Code, enabling developers to monitor and improve their own agentic systems. Finally, we show that LLM-as-a-Verifier can provide dense feedback for RL, improving the sample efficiency of SAC and GRPO on robotics and mathematical reasoning benchmarks.
articles.titleCn: 基于大语言模型的验证器：通用验证框架
articles.abstractCn: 扩展预训练、后训练和测试时计算已成为提升大型语言模型（LLM）能力的核心范式。在本工作中，我们识别验证——即确定解决方案正确性的能力——作为新的扩展维度。为解锁这一能力并证明其有效性，我们引入了“将LLM作为验证器”（LLM-as-a-Verifier），这是一个通用验证框架，能够在无需额外训练的情况下为智能体任务提供细粒度反馈。与标准语言模型（LM）判别器不同，后者提示LLM为候选解决方案生成离散分数，LLM-as-a-Verifier通过计算评分标记逻辑位的分布期望来生成连续分数。这种概率性表述使验证能够在多个维度上扩展：(1) 分数粒度、(2) 重复评估和(3) 标准分解。特别地，我们证明扩展分数粒度能更好地区分正负解决方案，从而实现更精确的比较。此外，扩展重复评估和标准分解通过降低方差和复杂性，始终如一地提升了验证精度。我们进一步引入了一种成本高效的排序算法，用于利用验证器的连续分数从候选方案中选出最佳解。LLM-as-a-Verifier在Terminal-Bench V2（86.5%）、SWE-Bench Verified（78.2%）、RoboRewardBench（87.4%）和MedAgentBench（73.3%）上均达到当前最佳性能。除验证外，LLM-as-a-Verifier提供的细粒度信号也可作为评估任务进度的代理指标。我们为Claude Code构建了扩展功能，使开发者能够监控和改进自身的智能体系统。最后，我们展示LLM-as-a-Verifier能为强化学习（RL）提供密集反馈，提升SAC和GRPO在机器人及数学推理基准测试中的样本效率。

articles.title: What Does a Discrete Diffusion Model Learn?
articles.abstract: What does a discrete diffusion model learn: a denoiser, a score ratio, or a bridge plug-in predictor? At the level of jump rates, these are one object in different coordinates, and reading a neural network in the wrong coordinate changes the process being trained and sampled. Starting with a rigorous derivation of the continuous-time Markov chain (CTMC) ELBO for any noising process, boundary terms included, we prove the \emph{Oracle Distance} theorem: the negative ELBO is exactly equal to the data entropy plus the path KL from the oracle reverse process to the learned one, not merely a bound. Its unique optimizer is therefore the conditional expectation of the true reverse jump rate given the current noisy state, and its irreducible cost is the rate at which the forward process $Z_t$ destroys information about the clean data $Z_0$, $-\tfrac{d}{dt}I(Z_0; Z_t)$, so every noising process shares the same best achievable negative ELBO: the data entropy. For sequences with token-factorizing noise, the oracle projection yields three exact coordinates for the optimizer: denoiser, cavity (bridge plug-in), and score, with closed-form conversions among them. This framework identifies which law each loss in the literature actually optimizes, recovering MDM, UDM, SEDD, and GIDD as special cases; explains why denoiser and cavity coincide for masked diffusion but not for uniform diffusion; proves that a denoiser parameterization makes the uniform ELBO diverge at initialization while the bridge plug-in stays finite; and calibrates ELBO implementations exactly at initialization. Every identity is verified numerically, without approximation, on an exactly solvable model.
articles.titleCn: 离散扩散模型学习什么？
articles.abstractCn: 离散扩散模型学习的是什么：去噪器、分数比，还是桥接插件预测器？在跳率层面，这些是同一对象在不同坐标系下的表现，错误地读取神经网络会改变训练和采样的过程。从任何噪声过程的连续时间马尔可夫链（CTMC）ELBO的严格推导开始，包括边界项，我们证明了“神谕距离”定理：负ELBO精确等于数据熵加上从神谕反向过程到学习过程的路径KL散度，而不仅仅是界限。因此其唯一的最优化者是给定当前噪声状态下真实反向跳率的条件期望，其不可约成本是正向过程$Z_t$破坏干净数据$Z_0$信息速率$-\frac{d}{dt}I(Z_0; Z_t)$，所以所有噪声过程共享相同的最佳可达到负ELBO：数据熵。对于具有标记分解噪声的序列，神谕投影为优化器提供了三个精确坐标：去噪器、空腔（桥接插件）和分数，它们之间具有封闭形式的转换。该框架识别了文献中每个损失实际优化的法则，恢复了MDM、UDM、SEDD和GIDD作为特例；解释了去噪器和空腔在掩码扩散中为何一致但在均匀扩散中不一致；证明了去噪器参数化使均匀ELBO在初始化时发散而桥接插件保持有限；并在初始化时精确校准ELBO实现。每个等式都在一个精确可解模型上通过数值验证，无任何近似。

articles.title: GaP: A Graph-as-Policy Multi-Agent Self-Learning Harness For Variational Automation Tasks
articles.abstract: For robots to work reliably in commercial and industrial applications, can recent advances in agentic coding systems combine interpretable robot programming with the open-world adaptability of model-free policies? We focus on "Variational Automation" (VA), a class of tasks that have larger variations in object geometry and pose than fixed automation. Model-free policies often struggle to close the reliability gap for VA tasks, which must be executed persistently and reliably in commercial and industrial applications. Motivated by prior work on Task and Motion Planning (TAMP) and the Robot Operating System (ROS), we introduce Graph-as-Policy (GaP), a multi-agent coding harness that generates directed computation graphs with perception, planning, and control nodes from a Modular Open Robot Skill Library (MORSL). GaP then generates an internal simulation environment to rehearse task instances with different graphs in parallel to iteratively refine the graph structure and parameters to improve success rates and throughput. Evaluation with 8 new open VA task benchmarks, 4 in-simulation and 4 in real-world, suggests that GaP can achieve success rates that significantly outperform baselines. Details, code, and data can be found online: https://graph-robots.github.io/gap
articles.titleCn: GaP：用于变分自动化任务的图作为策略的多智能体自学习框架
articles.abstractCn: 为了让机器人在商业和工业应用中可靠地工作，最新的智能编码系统进展能否将可解释的机器人编程与无模型策略的开世界适应性相结合？我们关注“变分自动化”（VA），这类任务在物体几何形状和姿态上比固定自动化具有更大的变化。无模型策略往往难以弥补VA任务在商业和工业应用中持续可靠执行的可靠性差距。受任务与运动规划（TAMP）和机器人操作系统（ROS）先前工作的启发，我们引入了“图作为策略”（GaP），这是一种多智能体编码框架，它从模块化开放机器人技能库（MORSL）生成包含感知、规划和控制节点的有向计算图。GaP随后生成内部模拟环境，以并行地使用不同的图来排练任务实例，通过迭代优化图结构和参数来提高成功率和吞吐量。通过对8个新的开放VA任务基准（其中4个在模拟中，4个在真实世界中）的评估表明，GaP可以实现显著优于基线的成功率。详细信息、代码和数据可在网上找到：https://graph-robots.github.io/gap

articles.title: SPEARBench: A Benchmark for Naturalness Evaluation in Streaming Speech-to-Speech Language Models
articles.abstract: Streaming speech-to-speech language models aim to answer spoken queries directly with synthetic speech. However, standard speech and text benchmarks do not capture whether these systems behave naturally in conversations, where timing, turn-taking, prosody, interpersonal stance, language and dialect consistency, and relationship-aware appropriateness jointly shape perceived quality. We introduce SPEARBench, a benchmark for evaluating naturalness in speech-to-speech language models from question-answer interactions. SPEARBench constructs controlled dialogue prompts from the Seamless Interaction corpus, runs inference across multiple models, and evaluates generated answers using a multidimensional protocol that covers response latency, interruptions, speech quality, ASR robustness, language and dialect consistency, emotional naturalness, interpersonal stance, and explainable distributional baselines. The benchmark includes original human answers as a reference condition and reports results for several contemporary models. Results show that current models can achieve high signal-level quality and low ASR error while still differing from human conversational behavior in latency, overlap, dialect preservation, emotional adaptation, and interpersonal stance dynamics.
articles.titleCn: SPEARBench：流式语音到语音语言模型自然度评估基准
articles.abstractCn: 流式语音到语音语言模型旨在通过合成语音直接回答语音查询。然而，标准的语音和文本基准并未捕捉到这些系统在对话中是否表现得自然，因为在对话中，时间、轮流发言、韵律、人际立场、语言和方言一致性以及关系感知的适当性共同塑造了感知质量。我们引入了SPEAR基准，这是一个用于评估语音到语音语言模型在问答交互中自然性的基准。SPEAR基准从无缝交互语料库中构建受控的对话提示，在多个模型上运行推理，并使用一个涵盖响应延迟、打断、语音质量、语音识别鲁棒性、语言和方言一致性、情感自然性、人际立场以及可解释分布基线的多维协议来评估生成的答案。该基准将原始人类答案作为参考条件，并报告了几种当代模型的结果。结果表明，当前模型可以实现高信号级质量和低语音识别错误，但在延迟、重叠、方言保留、情感适应以及人际立场动态方面仍与人类对话行为存在差异。

articles.title: REDDIT: Correcting Model-Generated Timestamp Drift in ASR without Forgetting via Replay-Based Distribution Editing

authors.name: Ke-Han Lu
authors.affiliation: versus 524.2% for ordinary SFT decoder tuning

articles.abstract: Modern autoregressive ASR systems can emit timestamps as decoded tokens, enabling timestamped transcription without frame-level aligners or inference-time post-processing. We show that these generated timestamps can drift across long non-speech spans: the transcript may remain plausible, but the decoded time axis drifts away from the audio. We study this non-speech-induced timestamp drift with self-built gap and long-gap benchmarks across 15 evaluated timestamp-producing ASR and audio-language systems. Naive timestamp-corrected fine-tuning improves alignment but can severely degrade non-target ASR behavior, exposing a forgetting problem. We propose REDDIT(REplay-based Distribution eDITing), a lightweight two-stage post-training framework that corrects timestamps while avoiding this catastrophic forgetting: it first edits timestamp targets under the model's own replayed decoder context while matching the frozen base distribution on non-timestamp tokens, then applies a short edited-prefix refinement stage. In this framework, we construct correction supervision without human transcripts or human timestamp annotations by combining VAD-trimmed speech spans with inserted non-speech gaps and known concatenation offsets. On Whisper-tiny, 34.9 hours of targeted correction audio used and only 1.6% of model parameters updated, raising long-gap mIoU from 38.7% to 95.0% and reducing mixed-gap out-of-domain AAS from 2752 ms to 223 ms while preserving CV-en MER at 41.3% (versus 524.2% for ordinary SFT decoder tuning).
articles.titleCn: REDDIT：通过基于重放的分布编辑，在ASR中纠正模型生成的时戳漂移而不遗忘
articles.abstractCn: 现代自回归语音识别系统可以生成时间戳作为解码的标记，从而无需帧级对齐器或推理时后处理即可实现带时间戳的转录。我们证明这些生成的时间戳会在长非语音片段中漂移：转录内容可能仍然合理，但解码的时间轴会偏离音频。我们通过构建15个评估时间戳生成语音识别和音频语言系统的自建间隙和长间隙基准，研究了非语音引起的时戳漂移。简单的时戳校正微调可以提高对齐度，但会严重降低非目标语音识别行为，暴露出遗忘问题。我们提出了REDDIT（基于重放的分布编辑），一种轻量级的两阶段后训练框架，它在校正时戳的同时避免了灾难性的遗忘：它首先在模型自身的重放解码器上下文中编辑时戳目标，同时在非时戳标记上匹配冻结的基础分布，然后应用一个短编辑前缀精炼阶段。在这个框架中，我们通过结合VAD修剪的语音片段和插入的非语音间隙以及已知的连接偏移来构建校正监督，而无需人工转录或人工时戳标注。在Whisper-tiny上，使用了34.9小时的目标校正音频，仅更新了1.6%的模型参数，将长间隙mIoU从38.7%提高到95.0%，并将混合间隙域外AAS从2752毫秒减少到223毫秒，同时将CV-en MER保持在41.3%（而普通SFT解码器微调为524.2%）。

articles.title: Faithfulness to Refusal: A Causal Audit of Neuron Selectors
articles.abstract: Attribution scores increasingly identify which neuron rows of a language model matter for applications such as pruning, interpretability, and editing for safety, yet whether they identify causally important rows is rarely tested directly. We address this with two paired audits built on one-shot neuron-row zeroing. We first audit selectors at the language-modeling level: attribution methods substantially outperform activation and magnitude-based baselines at identifying dispensable rows across five LLMs. We then adapt the same intervention into a behavior test by driving it with a contrastive harmful-versus-benign signal; the attributed rows are sufficient to install refusal on hate and crime while keeping benign over-refusal low and preserving language model fluency, and specific in that layer-matched random controls at the same depths fail. Highly rank-stable selectors can be among the least causally valid. Refusal moreover lives in a redundant subspace, where different attribution methods install it through largely disjoint row sets, so the recovered edit is one realization of a sufficient set rather than a unique mechanism. Together, these findings show that rank-stability proxies miss the kinds of selector failures a direct causal audit can surface.%
articles.titleCn: 对拒绝的忠诚：神经元选择器的因果审计
articles.abstractCn: 归因分数越来越多地用于识别语言模型中哪些神经元行对剪枝、可解释性和安全编辑等应用至关重要，但它们是否识别出因果上重要的行却很少得到直接检验。我们通过基于单次神经元行置零的两种配对审计来解决这个问题。首先，我们在语言模型层面审计选择器：归因方法在识别可省略行方面显著优于基于激活和幅度的基线，涵盖五个大型语言模型。接着，我们将相同的干预措施转化为行为测试，通过对比有害与无害信号驱动它；归因的行足以在仇恨和犯罪内容上实施拒绝，同时保持无害过度拒绝低并保持语言模型的流畅性，且具有特异性，因为在相同深度上的层匹配随机控制失败。高度排名稳定的选区可能是因果效度最低的。此外，拒绝存在于一个冗余子空间中，不同的归因方法通过几乎不重叠的行集来实施它，因此恢复的编辑是一个充分集的实现，而不是一个独特的机制。综合这些发现表明，排名稳定性代理指标会遗漏直接因果审计可以揭示的选择器失效类型。

articles.title: Selective Disclosure Watermarking for Large Language Models
articles.abstract: Watermarking methods embed imperceptible and verifiable signals into text generated by large language models (LLMs). Existing approaches include zero-bit schemes for distinguishing synthetic text from human writing and multi-bit schemes for embedding metadata. However, current multi-bit watermarking methods do not allow selective disclosure: verifying any part of the watermark requires revealing the entire embedded message. This lack of control leads to unnecessary information exposure and raises privacy concerns. We propose Hierarchical Vocabulary Routing (HeRo), a watermarking framework that enables selective disclosure of embedded metadata. The method recursively partitions the vocabulary and distributes watermark information across hierarchical layers, so that different verifiers can decode only the portions of the payload corresponding to their access level. We show that the proposed scheme preserves the unbiasedness of the underlying sampling process and thus maintains text quality. Experiments demonstrate that our framework supports fine-grained access control while achieving high detection accuracy and low latency. Code is available at https://github.com/xuyangc03/hero-watermark.
articles.titleCn: 针对大型语言模型的选择性披露水印技术
articles.abstractCn: 水印方法将难以察觉且可验证的信号嵌入到大语言模型（LLM）生成的文本中。现有方法包括用于区分合成文本与人类写作的零比特方案以及用于嵌入元数据的多位方案。然而，当前的多位水印方法不允许选择性披露：验证水印的任何部分都需要透露整个嵌入的消息。这种缺乏控制会导致不必要的信息暴露并引发隐私问题。我们提出了分层词汇路由（HeRo），这是一个水印框架，能够实现嵌入元数据的选择性披露。该方法递归地划分词汇表，并将水印信息分布在分层层级中，以便不同验证者只能解码与其访问级别对应的负载部分。我们证明所提出的方案保留了底层采样过程的无偏性，从而保持了文本质量。实验表明，我们的框架支持细粒度的访问控制，同时实现了高检测精度和低延迟。代码可在 https://github.com/xuyangc03/hero-watermark 获取。

articles.title: How Much is Left? LLMs Linearly Encode Their Remaining Output Length
articles.abstract: Large language models generate one token at a time, yet their responses show remarkably consistent length structure: step-by-step solutions converge in predictable token counts, retrievals stop after a few sentences, retractions extend responses by measurable amounts. We ask whether the model carries an internal estimate of how much response remains. Training minimal-capacity linear probes on frozen hidden states of three open-weight 7-8B models across seven completion-style datasets, we find three converging pieces of evidence. First, total response length is linearly decodable from the prompt's last hidden state alone, before any output is emitted. Second, probe directions trained on natural-language datasets transfer broadly, including to controlled synthetic completions never seen in training, outperforming a statistical baseline; the converse direction generally fails, and this asymmetry is itself informative. Third, on curated high-loss completions, the probe's per-position estimate shifts upward at the moment the model retracts and restarts a partial solution, a directional behavior no position-only predictor can reproduce (qualitative, not aggregate). We frame this as approximate estimation of remaining generation length, distinct from exact-counting impossibility results for transformers, and interpret it as evidence that LLMs maintain a plan-like internal representation of output length (decodable, not necessarily used causally).
articles.titleCn: 还剩多少？大型语言模型线性地编码其剩余输出长度
articles.abstractCn: 大型语言模型逐个生成标记，但它们的响应表现出惊人的长度结构一致性：逐步解决方案在可预测的标记数量上收敛，检索在几个句子后停止，撤回通过可测量的量扩展响应。我们提出模型是否携带对剩余响应量的内部估计。在七个完成式数据集上，对三个开放权重7-8B模型的冻结隐藏状态训练最小容量线性探针，我们发现三方面趋于一致的证据。首先，总响应长度仅从提示的最后一个隐藏状态线性可解码，在任何输出发出之前。其次，在自然语言数据集上训练的探针方向可以广泛迁移，包括到训练中从未见过的受控合成完成，优于统计基线；相反的方向通常失败，这种不对称性本身也具有信息量。第三，在精选的高损失完成中，探针的每个位置估计在模型撤回并重新开始部分解决方案时向上移动，这种方向性行为没有仅基于位置的预测器能够复制（定性的，而非总体的）。我们将其表述为对剩余生成长度的近似估计，区别于转换器的不可能精确计数结果，并将其解释为证据，表明LLM维持着类似计划的内部输出长度表示（可解码，不一定被因果使用）。

articles.title: SalAngaBhava: A Sinhala Market Dataset for Aspect-based Sentiment Analysis
articles.abstract: Sentiment analysis has been a primary domain under Natural Language Processing (NLP) from its inception as it plays a vital role in both real-world and research applications. In high-resource languages, this has been extended a step further, and instead of predicting sentiment at the sentence level, models have been developed to detect more fine-grained sentiments at aspect level. However, in order to conduct this fine-grained Aspect-based Sentiment Analysis (ABSA), datasets annotated with aspects and sentiments toward the said aspects is required. Such datasets are lacking for low-resources languages among which, we can count Sinhala, an Indo-Aryan languages used primarily in Sri Lanka. In this work, we introduce, SalAngaBhava, a new Sinhala Aspect-based Sentiment Analysis dataset which contains Sinhala product reviews that are manually labeled with aspect terms and the associated sentiments (positive, negative, neutral). The data was collected from domain-relevant sources such as user-generated reviews and comments, and was annotated following carefully defined guidelines to ensure consistency and quality. The dataset consists of sentences and aspect-sentiment pairs, encompassing a considerable range of aspects from several domains. The analysis confirms that the dataset is well-structured and sufficiently balanced for ABSA research. This dataset can be used as a benchmark and facilitates further studies related to Sinhala natural language processing, and low-resource sentiment analysis tasks.
articles.titleCn: 萨拉阿纳巴瓦：一个用于基于方面的情感分析的僧伽罗语市场数据集
articles.abstractCn: 情感分析作为自然语言处理（NLP）的核心领域，自其诞生之初就发挥着至关重要的作用，在现实世界和科研应用中都具有重要意义。在高资源语言中，情感分析已被进一步拓展，模型不再局限于句子级别的情感预测，而是发展到能够检测更细粒度的方面级情感。然而，为了进行这种细粒度的基于方面的情感分析（ABSA），需要标注有方面及其相关情感的数据集。在低资源语言中，这类数据集尤为匮乏，其中斯里兰卡主要使用的印欧语系语言——僧伽罗语便是典型代表。在本工作中，我们介绍了SalAngaBhava，一个全新的僧伽罗语基于方面的情感分析数据集，其中包含人工标注了方面术语及其相关情感（积极、消极、中性）的僧伽罗语产品评论。这些数据来源于与领域相关的用户生成评论和评论，并遵循精心制定的标注指南以确保一致性和质量。该数据集由句子和方面-情感对组成，涵盖了多个领域中的广泛方面。分析表明，该数据集结构良好且平衡性充分，适用于ABSA研究。该数据集可作为基准，促进与僧伽罗语自然语言处理和低资源情感分析任务相关的研究。

articles.title: Streaming Neural Speech Codecs through Time-Invariant Representations
articles.abstract: Neural speech codecs are increasingly used as intermediate representations in codec-based speech generation systems. TiCodec introduces a factorized representation that separates time-varying speech content from time-invariant information through a Time-Invariant Representation Extraction (TIRE) module, potentially reducing the amount of information that must be modeled at the frame-level. In this work, we investigate the nature of the information captured by TIRE representations and their suitability for low-latency speech processing. Using a series of probing tasks, we analyze the influence of the encoder layer and show that intermediate layers capture complementary speaker- and environment-related information while containing little linguistic content. We further study several segment selection strategies for TIRE training and demonstrate that cross-file sampling improves the robustness of invariant representations. Based on these findings, we propose Dual-TIRE, a multi-level architecture that exploits the complementarity of different encoder layers and improves speech reconstruction quality and speaker similarity. Finally, we evaluate TiCodec in a streaming inference setting using successive 660ms processing blocks. Results show that streaming operation can be achieved without significant degradation in reconstruction performance, highlighting the potential of factorized neural codec representations for future low-latency speech generation systems.
articles.titleCn: 通过时不变表示流式传输神经语音编解码器
articles.abstractCn: 神经语音编解码器正越来越多地被用作基于编解码器的语音生成系统中的中间表示。TiCodec引入了一种分式表示，通过时不变表示提取（TIRE）模块将时变语音内容与时不变信息分离，从而可能减少需要在帧级建模的信息量。在这项工作中，我们研究了TIRE表示所捕获信息的本质及其适用于低延迟语音处理的可能性。通过一系列探测任务，我们分析了编码器层的影响，表明中间层捕获了互补的说话人和环境相关信息，而包含很少的语言内容。我们进一步研究了TIRE训练的几种片段选择策略，并证明交叉文件采样提高了不变表示的鲁棒性。基于这些发现，我们提出了Dual-TIRE，一种多级架构，它利用不同编码器层的互补性，并提高了语音重建质量和说话人相似度。最后，我们在连续的660ms处理块中，使用流式推理设置评估了TiCodec。结果表明，流式操作可以在重建性能没有显著下降的情况下实现，突出了分式神经编解码器表示在未来低延迟语音生成系统中的潜力。

articles.title: Progressive Refinement: An Iterative Pseudo-Labeling Approach for Mandarin-English Code-Switching ASR
articles.abstract: Code-switching (CS), alternating languages within the same utterance, poses significant challenges for automatic speech recognition (ASR) due to limited CS training data. This paper applies an iterative pseudo-labeling training approach to CS-ASR for the first time, demonstrating its effectiveness in leveraging unlabeled data to improve CS-ASR performance. The approach comprises three phases: pseudo-label generation, two-stage bilingual model training, and iterative improvements. It begins by generating pseudo-labels from a large unlabeled corpus, creating a semi-supervised dataset. This dataset supports a two-stage training framework where the model is pre-trained and then fine-tuned on supervised CS data. Iterative refinements further enhance the model's accuracy in handling complex CS scenarios. Our approach significantly advances CS-ASR systems, achieving notable Mix Error Rate (MER) reductions on SEAME's devman (6.35%) and devsge (8.29%) subsets.
articles.titleCn: 渐进式细化：一种用于普通话-英语代码转换语音识别的迭代伪标签方法
articles.abstractCn: 语码转换（CS），即在同一话语中交替使用不同语言，由于缺乏CS训练数据，给自动语音识别（ASR）带来了重大挑战。本文首次将迭代伪标签训练方法应用于CS-ASR，展示了其利用未标记数据提升CS-ASR性能的有效性。该方法包含三个阶段：伪标签生成、两阶段双语模型训练和迭代优化。首先从大型未标记语料库中生成伪标签，构建半监督数据集。该数据集支持两阶段训练框架，模型先在监督CS数据上进行预训练，再进行微调。迭代优化进一步提升了模型处理复杂CS场景的准确性。我们的方法显著推动了CS-ASR系统的发展，在SEAME的devman（6.35%）和devsge（8.29%）子集上实现了显著的混合错误率（MER）降低。

articles.title: Curated retrieval versus open web search in public AI information services: a coverage-trust trade-off
articles.abstract: Public institutions increasingly use large language models (LLMs) to answer citizens' questions, often pairing a curated knowledge base with live web search, yet whether the sources behind these answers can be trusted has received little empirical scrutiny. We report a pre-launch expert evaluation of Evrópuvefur, an independent, government-funded service run by the University of Iceland that answers questions about the European Union, conducted as Iceland prepared for its referendum of 29 August 2026 on whether to resume EU accession talks. Five domain experts produced 551 evaluations of 449 AI-generated answers, scoring each against a seven-criterion quality rubric and, separately, flagging individual cited sources. We compared two retrieval paths: a curated local corpus (RAG) and open web search. In more than a third of the reviewed web-search answers (35%, 65 of 187), at least one cited source was flagged, almost always as untrustworthy or irrelevant; curated sources were flagged far less often and only for being out of date. Web search answered more questions, but at the cost of source quality; the curated corpus was trustworthy yet limited in coverage, and the model declined to respond when it fell short. The citation mix also passed over strong sources: across all 287 web-search answers, the system never cited RÚV, the public broadcaster and the country's most widely used news source. A companion prompt ablation shows how weak prompt-level steering is: a trusted-domain list in the system prompt raised the share of citations to listed domains only from 12% to 21%. Fluency and topical fit did not predict source trustworthiness. We argue that source trustworthiness is a measurable yet largely invisible dimension of information quality in public AI services, and we discuss transparency-oriented responses and their trade-offs.
articles.titleCn: 公共人工智能信息服务中的精选检索与开放网络搜索：覆盖范围与信任度的权衡
articles.abstractCn: 公共机构越来越多地使用大型语言模型（LLM）来回答公民的问题，通常将精选的知识库与实时网络搜索相结合，但这些问题背后的信息来源是否可信，却很少得到实证检验。我们报告了一项针对Evrópuvefur的专家评估，该服务由冰岛大学运营，是一个独立且由政府资助的服务，旨在回答有关欧盟的问题，评估在冰岛为2026年8月29日是否恢复欧盟加入谈判的全民公投做准备期间进行。五位领域专家对449个AI生成的答案进行了551次评估，根据七项标准的质量评分表对每个答案进行评分，并单独标记所引用的每个来源。我们比较了两种检索路径：精选本地语料库（RAG）和开放网络搜索。在审查的超过三分之一的网络搜索答案中（35%，187个中的65个），至少有一个被标记的来源被标记为不可信或不相关；精选来源很少被标记，并且仅因为过时而被标记。网络搜索回答了更多问题，但代价是信息来源的质量；精选语料库是可信的，但覆盖范围有限，当模型无法满足要求时，它会拒绝回答。引用来源的混合也忽略了强大的来源：在所有287个网络搜索答案中，系统从未引用RÚV，即公共广播电台和国家最广泛使用的新闻来源。一个配套的提示消融实验表明了弱提示级引导的效果：系统提示中的可信领域列表仅将列出的领域的引用比例从12%提高到21%。流畅性和主题契合度并不能预测来源的可信度。我们认为，来源的可信度是公共AI服务中信息质量的一个可衡量的但很大程度上不可见的维度，我们讨论了以透明为导向的应对措施及其权衡。

articles.title: Noisy-Channel Minimum Bayes Risk Decoding
articles.abstract: Minimum Bayes Risk (MBR) decoding yields more robust and higher-quality text generation than maximum a posteriori (MAP) decoding by selecting hypotheses that maximize expected utility over sampled pseudo-references. However, there exists a discrepancy in the design: hypothesis selection calculates expected utility scores conditioned on given pseudo-references, while commonly used evaluation metrics, e.g., BLEU and COMET, are asymmetric. Therefore, it is important to consider both hypothesis-to-reference and reference-to-hypothesis directional effects. In this study, we introduce a noisy channel decomposition of MBR decoding that naturally incorporates bidirectional effects to account for these asymmetries. We decompose MBR decoding into four interacting components: hypothesis-to-reference likelihood, reference-to-hypothesis likelihood, hypothesis prior, and reference prior. This decomposition provides a unified interpretation of existing MBR variants and enables metric- and task-specific interpretability by isolating the contribution of each channel. Our comprehensive analysis reveals that channel-wise contributions exhibit distinct characteristics across metrics while remaining consistent across tasks, and suggests that appropriate channel weighting may lead to improvements over original MBR decoding.
articles.titleCn: 噪声信道最小贝叶斯风险译码
articles.abstractCn: 最小贝叶斯风险（MBR）解码通过选择在采样伪参考上最大化预期效用的假设，相比最大后验（MAP）解码能生成更鲁棒、更高质量的文本。然而，在设计中存在差异：假设选择计算基于给定伪参考的预期效用分数，而常用的评估指标（如BLEU和COMET）是不对称的。因此，需要考虑假设到参考和参考到假设的双向效应。本研究引入了MBR解码的噪声信道分解，自然地整合了双向效应以解释这些不对称性。我们将MBR解码分解为四个交互组件：假设到参考似然、参考到假设似然、假设先验和参考先验。这种分解为现有MBR变体提供了统一的解释，并通过隔离每个信道的贡献，实现了指标和任务特定的可解释性。我们的综合分析揭示，信道贡献在不同指标上表现出不同特征，但在不同任务上保持一致，并表明适当的信道加权可能改进原始MBR解码。

articles.title: Unified Audio Intelligence Without Regressing on Text Intelligence
articles.abstract: Audio intelligence involves understanding, reasoning about, and generating both audio and speech. In this work, we introduce Nemotron-Labs-Audex-30B-A3B (Audex), a unified audio-text LLM built on Nemotron-Cascade-2-30B-A3B, a strong text-only MoE LLM. Audex adopts a simple unified design with a single Transformer decoder: audio inputs are encoded and projected into the text embedding space, while text tokens and quantized audio output tokens are treated uniformly during generation. This architecture enables strong audio-text fusion, seamless multimodal generation, and compatibility with standard LLM training and inference infrastructure. For training, we meticulously curate audio-text datasets comprising 157.4B audio tokens and 320.5B text tokens. We apply multi-stage supervised training on these datasets, followed by text-only Cascade RL and multi-domain on-policy distillation. Audex delivers state-of-the-art audio understanding, speech recognition and translation, text-to-speech, audio generation, and speech-to-speech generation, while preserving very compelling reasoning, alignment, knowledge, long-context, and agentic capabilities of its text-only LLM backbone with marginal or no regression. We release the model checkpoints to facilitate open research.
articles.titleCn: 无需牺牲文本智能的统一音频智能
articles.abstractCn: 音频智能涉及对音频和语音的理解、推理以及生成。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 Nemotron-Labs-Audex-30B-A3B（Audex），这是一个基于 Nemotron-Cascade-2-30B-A3B（一个强大的纯文本 MoE 大语言模型）构建的统一音频-文本大语言模型。Audex 采用简单的统一设计，使用单个 Transformer 解码器：音频输入被编码并映射到文本嵌入空间，而在生成过程中，文本标记和量化音频输出标记被同等对待。这种架构实现了强大的音频-文本融合、无缝的多模态生成，并兼容标准的 LLM 训练和推理基础设施。在训练方面，我们精心策划了包含 157.4B 音频标记和 320.5B 文本标记的音频-文本数据集。我们在这些数据集上应用了多阶段监督训练，随后进行纯文本的 Cascade 强化学习和多域在线蒸馏。Audex 提供了最先进的音频理解、语音识别和翻译、文本到语音、音频生成和语音到语音生成能力，同时保留了其纯文本 LLM 主干的强大推理、对齐、知识、长上下文和智能体能力，且几乎没有退化。我们发布模型检查点以促进开放研究。

articles.title: RABBiT: Rapidly adaptive BOLD foundation model via brain-tuning for accurate zero-shot and few-shot prediction of speech-elicited responses in the brain

authors.name: Mariya Toneva
authors.affiliation: Rapidly Adaptive BOLD foundation model via BraIn-Tuning

articles.abstract: Language understanding in the brain is context-dependent, varying across experimental stimuli and individuals, which makes it difficult to build computational models that generalize across both. This calls for a foundation model of language-evoked brain activity that can capture shared structure while adapting efficiently to new participants and inputs. We introduce RABBiT (Rapidly Adaptive BOLD foundation model via BraIn-Tuning), a compact audio-to-fMRI encoder designed for accurate zero- and few-shot prediction. A comprehensive evaluation on 324 participants across multiple unseen fMRI datasets shows that RABBiT enables accurate zero-shot prediction of fMRI responses to natural speech across auditory and language-selective regions, surpassing the SOTA foundation model for fMRI and predictions based on group averages. With as little as 10 minutes of participant-specific data, RABBiT further improves performance via parameter-efficient tuning, substantially outperforming per-participant linear models. RABBiT's performance is driven by two key innovations: (1) learned region-specific attention, and (2) a decomposition of brain responses into shared and subject-specific components, combined with a brain-tuned speech backbone. In addition to supporting strong predictive accuracy, the structured, region-specific representations that RABBiT learns enable interpretability. By eliminating the need for extensive per-participant data and model fitting, RABBiT enables scalable population-level analyses of language in the human brain. We make the code available at https://github.com/bridge-ai-neuro/rabbit.
articles.titleCn: RABBiT：通过脑部调谐实现快速自适应的BOLD基础模型，以准确预测大脑中的语音诱发反应，适用于零样本和少样本预测
articles.abstractCn: 大脑中的语言理解具有情境依赖性，会因实验刺激和个体不同而有所差异，这使得构建能够泛化于两者的计算模型变得困难。这需要一种语言诱发大脑活动的基座模型，能够捕捉共享结构，同时高效地适应新的参与者和输入。我们介绍了RABBiT（通过BraIn-Tuning实现的快速自适应BOLD基座模型），这是一种紧凑的音频到fMRI编码器，旨在实现精确的零样本和少样本预测。在跨越多个未见过的fMRI数据集的324名参与者上的综合评估表明，RABBiT能够准确预测自然语音在听觉和语言选择区域引起的fMRI反应，超越了fMRI的SOTA基座模型和基于群体平均值的预测。仅需10分钟的特定参与者数据，RABBiT通过参数高效的微调进一步提升了性能，显著优于每个参与者的线性模型。RABBiT的性能得益于两个关键创新：（1）学习区域特定的注意力机制；（2）将大脑反应分解为共享和个体特定的成分，结合大脑调谐的语音主干。除了支持强大的预测精度，RABBiT学习到的结构化、区域特定的表示还实现了可解释性。通过消除对大量特定参与者数据和模型拟合的需求，RABBiT能够实现人类大脑语言的可扩展群体级分析。我们将在https://github.com/bridge-ai-neuro/rabbit提供代码。

articles.title: EdgeBench: Unveiling Scaling Laws of Learning from Real-World Environments
articles.abstract: Pretraining scaling laws reveal that model capability improves predictably with data and compute. But learning from real world environments after deployment remains far less understood. Analyzing roughly 38,000 hours of agent interaction with the environment across 134 real world tasks, we find, to the best of our knowledge, the first evidence that overall performance during environment learning follows a log-sigmoid scaling law with remarkably high precision, reaching R^2 = 0.998. Across model generations, we also find that agent learning speed roughly doubles every three months. This discovery stems from EdgeBench, a suite of 134 real world tasks with ultra-long horizons, spanning scientific discovery, software engineering, combinatorial optimization, professional knowledge work, formal mathematics, and interactive games. Each task sustains at least 12 hours of continuous agent operation under rich, multilevel feedback, and is built through substantial expert effort. We publicly release 51 tasks and our full evaluation framework to accelerate the study of how agents learn from real world experience.
articles.titleCn: EdgeBench：揭示从真实世界环境学习中的规模规律
articles.abstractCn: 预训练规模法则表明，模型能力随着数据和计算资源的增加而可预测地提升。然而，模型在实际部署后从真实世界环境中学习的过程仍然远未被充分理解。通过对134项真实世界任务中智能体与环境交互的大约38,000小时的分析，我们首次发现，在环境学习过程中整体性能遵循对数Sigmoid规模法则，精度极高，达到R² = 0.998。此外，我们还发现，在模型迭代过程中，智能体的学习速度大约每三个月翻倍。这一发现源于EdgeBench，这是一套包含134项具有超长时间跨度的真实世界任务，涵盖科学发现、软件工程、组合优化、专业知识工作、形式数学和互动游戏等领域。每个任务在丰富的多层级反馈下至少能持续12小时的智能体连续运行，并经过大量专家的精心构建。我们公开发布了51项任务和完整的评估框架，以加速对智能体如何从真实世界经验中学习的研究。

articles.title: DSpark: Confidence-Scheduled Speculative Decoding with Semi-Autoregressive Generation
articles.abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates Large Language Model (LLM) inference by decoupling draft generation from target verification. While recent parallel drafters efficiently propose long token sequences in a single forward pass, they suffer from rapid acceptance decay due to a lack of inter-token dependencies. Furthermore, indiscriminately verifying these extended blocks wastes critical batch capacity on tokens with high rejection risks, severely degrading throughput in high-concurrency serving systems. We introduce DSpark, a speculative decoding framework that unifies high-throughput parallel generation with adaptive, load-aware verification. To maintain draft quality, DSpark utilizes a semi-autoregressive architecture, coupling a parallel backbone with a lightweight sequential module, to introduce intra-block dependency modeling and mitigate suffix decay. To optimize system efficiency, DSpark employs confidence-scheduled verification, dynamically tailoring the verification length for each request based on estimated prefix survival probabilities and engine-specific throughput profiles. On offline benchmarks across diverse domains, DSpark substantially improves the accepted length over state-of-the-art autoregressive and parallel drafters. When deployed within the DeepSeek-V4 serving system under live user traffic, DSpark successfully mitigates verification waste. Compared to the established production baseline (MTP-1), DSpark accelerates per-user generation speeds by 60 to 85 percent at matched throughput levels. More importantly, by preventing severe throughput degradation under strict interactivity constraints, it enables performance tiers that were previously unattainable, shifting the Pareto frontier of our serving system.
articles.titleCn: DSpark：基于置信度调度的推测解码与半自回归生成
articles.abstractCn: 推测解码通过将草稿生成与目标验证解耦，加速了大型语言模型（LLM）的推理过程。虽然近期的并行草稿生成器能够通过单次前向传递高效地提出长标记序列，但由于缺乏标记间依赖性，它们存在快速接受衰减的问题。此外，不加区分地验证这些扩展块会浪费关键批次容量在具有高拒绝风险的标记上，严重降低了高并发服务系统的吞吐量。我们引入了DSpark，这是一个推测解码框架，它将高吞吐量并行生成与自适应、负载感知的验证相结合。为了保持草稿质量，DSpark采用半自回归架构，将并行主干与轻量级顺序模块耦合，以引入块内依赖建模并缓解后缀衰减。为了优化系统效率，DSpark采用置信度调度验证，根据估计的前缀存活概率和特定引擎的吞吐量配置文件，动态调整每个请求的验证长度。在跨不同领域的离线基准测试中，DSpark在当前最先进的自回归和并行草稿生成器上显著提高了接受长度。当在DeepSeek-V4服务系统内部署并承受实时用户流量时，DSpark成功缓解了验证浪费。与既定的生产基线（MTP-1）相比，在匹配的吞吐量水平下，DSpark将每用户生成速度加速了60%至85%。更重要的是，通过防止在严格的交互约束下严重吞吐量下降，它实现了以前无法达到的性能层级，将我们的服务系统的帕累托前沿向前推进。

articles.title: When Agents Lie: Premeditation, Persistence, and Exploitation in Repeated Games
articles.abstract: As large language models are deployed as autonomous agents that communicate intentions before acting, a critical safety question is whether agents that publicly commit to actions will honor those commitments. We place LLM agents in repeated $n$-player games with a three-stage protocol that separates private intent, public announcement, and final action, allowing us to identify whether each deviation from a stated announcement was already planned during private deliberation. Evaluating three frontier models across six games in homogeneous and heterogeneous groups over 10 rounds, we report two findings. First, when agents deviate from their announcements, the deviation is predominantly already stated in their private plan (exceeding 90% in the highest-deception conditions), yet this is not a fixed model property: the same model ranges from perfect honesty to near-total deviation across games. Second, different models interpret announcements incompatibly, some as binding commitments and others as cheap talk, producing payoff gaps that emerge in Round~0 and persist across all 10 rounds. Systems that combine models from different providers therefore cannot assume shared announcement semantics and require empirical testing of model interactions before deployment.
articles.comment: Best Paper Award at ICML NExT-Game Workshop
articles.titleCn: 当代理人撒谎：重复博弈中的预谋、坚持与利用
articles.abstractCn: 随着大型语言模型被部署为在行动前沟通意图的自主代理，一个关键的安全问题是公开承诺行动的代理是否会履行这些承诺。我们将大型语言模型代理置于具有三阶段协议的重复n人博弈中，该协议将私人意图、公开宣告和最终行动分离开来，使我们能够识别每个偏离公开宣告的行为是否已在私人商议中计划。在10轮的同类和异类群体中评估三种前沿模型，在六个博弈中，我们报告了两个发现。首先，当代理偏离其宣告时，偏离行为主要已在它们的私人计划中声明（在最高欺骗条件下超过90%），但这并不是一个固定的模型属性：同一模型在不同博弈中范围从完全诚实到接近完全偏离。其次，不同模型对宣告的解释不一致，有些将其视为具有约束力的承诺，而另一些则视为廉价的闲谈，导致在轮次0出现的收益差距在所有10轮中持续存在。因此，结合不同供应商模型的系统不能假设共享的宣告语义，并在部署前需要对模型交互进行实证测试。

articles.title: Localized LoRA-MoE: Block-wise Low-Rank Experts With Adaptive Routing
articles.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) and high-dimensional perception networks increasingly rely on parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) to adapt to diverse operational contexts. However, standard methods like LoRA are structurally limited by a monolithic bottleneck, making them highly susceptible to gradient warfare. Interleaved multi-task streams may trigger destructive optimization feedback, collapsing adapter weights into unspecialized averages. While recent spatial partitioning methods have introduced block-wise isolation, they remain trapped in static topologies, unable to adapt to dynamic task-switching or environmental sensor failure. In this work, we introduce Localized LoRA-MoE, a unified framework that fuses localized spatial blocking with dynamic, context-conditioned routing. We propose and evaluate two novel architectural paradigms: Block-Wise LoRA-MoE (Centralized Macro-Routing), which modulates the entire structural grid via a monolithic context signal, and Cell-Wise LoRA-MoE (Decentralized Micro-Routing), which empowers every coordinate cell in the matrix grid with autonomous, localized expert gating. Through a comprehensive suite of benchmarks, ranging from high-dimensional SVD matrix simulations and real-world tabular transformations to spatial vision perception under sensor degradation, we demonstrate that both architectures resolve optimization deadlocks inherent in static baselines. Our empirical results establish that decentralized cell-level gating achieves complete statistical parity with an omniscient global coordinator, providing a robust "gradient firewall" that protects surviving pathways from fault-propagated corruption. Our proposals consistently outperform static baselines, offering a scalable and parameter-efficient solution for dynamic model adaptation across granular coordinate fields and shifting operational regimes.
articles.titleCn: 基于位置的LoRA-MoE：基于块的低秩专家与自适应路由
articles.abstractCn: 大型语言模型（LLMs）和高维感知网络越来越多地依赖参数高效的微调（PEFT）来适应不同的操作环境。然而，像LoRA这样的标准方法在结构上受到单一瓶颈的限制，使其极易受到梯度战争的攻击。交错的多任务流可能会触发破坏性的优化反馈，导致适配器权重压缩成非专业化的平均值。虽然最近的空间划分方法引入了块状隔离，但它们仍然被困在静态拓扑中，无法适应动态的任务切换或环境传感器故障。在这项工作中，我们引入了Localized LoRA-MoE，这是一个融合了局部空间块划分和动态、上下文条件路由的统一框架。我们提出了并评估了两种新颖的架构范式：块状LoRA-MoE（集中式宏观路由），通过单一上下文信号调制整个结构网格，以及单元LoRA-MoE（分布式微观路由），赋予矩阵网格中的每个坐标单元自主、局部的专家门控能力。通过一系列全面的基准测试，从高维SVD矩阵模拟、真实世界的表格转换到传感器退化下的空间视觉感知，我们证明这两种架构都解决了静态基线中固有的优化死锁问题。我们的实证结果表明，分布式单元级门控与全知的全局协调者实现了完全的统计均等，提供了一个强大的“梯度防火墙”，保护了幸存路径免受故障传播的污染。我们的提案始终优于静态基线，为跨粒度坐标域和变化操作环境中的动态模型适应提供了一种可扩展且参数高效的解决方案。

articles.title: Rating the Pitch, Not the Product: User Evaluations of LLMs Reflect Expectations More Than Performance
articles.abstract: Imagine two users interact with the same LLM. One has been told it is the cutting-edge flagship model; the other, an older, weaker model. They walk away with markedly different ratings of its usefulness and intelligence, yet they used the same model. In a controlled study, 162 participants each used one of six LLMs from two families across three collaborative tasks, after first viewing a landing page that matched, overstated, or understated their model's true capability. This pre-interaction framing shifted user opinions and interaction behavior while task performance did not. Oversold users rated the model more favorably and used more directive prompting, while Undersold users wrote longer, more collaborative prompts. The quality of what users and the model produced together depended only on the model's true capability, not on what users were told. Participants' change in model impressions after use, measured across two impression measures, was not predicted by task performance ($β= -0.01$ and $0.11$, both n.s.), but by whether the model met users' expectations ($β= 0.47$ and $0.50$, both $p < .001$) and how confident they felt working with it ($β= 0.47$ and $0.36$, both $p < .001$). After interaction, users are still rating the pitch, not the product: user-elicited LLM evaluations, including the preference data driving public leaderboards, measure expectation management at least as much as the model itself.
articles.titleCn: 评价演讲，而非产品：用户对大型语言模型的评价更多地反映了期望，而非性能
articles.abstractCn: 想象两个用户与同一个大型语言模型（LLM）互动。一个被告知这是最前沿的旗舰模型，另一个则是一个较旧、较弱模型。他们离开时对模型有用性和智能的评价截然不同，尽管他们使用的是同一个模型。在一项受控研究中，162名参与者分别使用了来自两个系列中的六个LLM，并在三个协作任务中进行了互动，他们首先浏览了一个与模型真实能力相匹配、夸大或低估其能力的着陆页。这种互动前的框架改变了用户的观点和互动行为，但任务表现并未受到影响。被夸大宣传的用户对模型评价更积极，并使用了更多指令性的提示；而被低估的用户则写出了更长、更具协作性的提示。用户和模型共同产生的成果质量仅取决于模型的真实能力，而与用户被告知的内容无关。参与者在使用后对模型的印象变化，通过两个印象测量指标进行衡量，并未被任务表现所预测（$β= -0.01$ 和 $0.11$，均不显著），而是被模型是否满足用户期望（$β= 0.47$ 和 $0.50$，均$p < .001$）以及他们使用模型时的信心（$β= 0.47$ 和 $0.36$，均$p < .001$）所预测。互动后，用户仍在评价宣传，而非产品：用户引发的LLM评价，包括驱动公共排行榜的偏好数据，至少与模型本身一样衡量了期望管理。

articles.title: MIRAGE: Defending Long-Form RAG Against Misinformation Pollution
articles.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) improves factuality by grounding LLMs in external evidence, but real-world retrieval is often polluted: semantically relevant passages may contain subtle misinformation, misleading framings, or fabrications. We introduce MIRAGE, a training-free, model-agnostic defense for long-form RAG. MIRAGE builds an NLI-based cross-document claim graph and applies a Defended-Claims Gate to either condition generation on a consistent, multi-source supported subset or to block retrieval and answer parametrically. We also release a minimal-edit pollution protocol spanning four perturbation families (Unambiguous, Conflicting, Misleading, Fabricated) to construct matched clean, mixed, and fully polluted evaluation regimes. Across four long-form QA benchmarks and multiple commercial and open-weight LLMs, pollution severely degrades vanilla RAG, while MIRAGE consistently restores factuality under mixed and fully polluted evidence and outperforms prior robust-RAG methods. Our implementation and datasets are available at https://github.com/SaadElDine/MIRAGE.
articles.titleCn: MIRAGE：防御错误信息污染的长文本RAG
articles.abstractCn: 检索增强生成（RAG）通过将大型语言模型（LLMs）与外部证据相结合来提高事实性，但现实世界的检索往往受到污染：语义相关的段落可能包含细微的错误信息、误导性框架或捏造内容。我们介绍了MIRAGE，这是一种无需训练、与模型无关的防御方法，用于长文本RAG。MIRAGE构建了一个基于自然语言推理（NLI）的跨文档主张图，并应用了一个防御性主张门控，用于在一致的多源支持子集上条件生成，或参数化地阻止检索和回答。我们还发布了一个最小编辑污染协议，涵盖四个扰动家族（无歧义、冲突、误导、捏造），用于构建匹配的干净、混合和完全污染的评估环境。在四个长文本问答基准和多个商业及开放权重LLMs上，污染严重降低了普通RAG的性能，而MIRAGE在混合和完全污染的证据下始终恢复事实性，并优于先前的鲁棒RAG方法。我们的实现和数据集可在https://github.com/SaadElDine/MIRAGE获取。

articles.title: Beyond Independent Labels: Schwartz-Geometry Decoding for Human Value Detection

authors.name: Paolo Rosso
authors.affiliation: held fixed by its selection rule

articles.abstract: Human value detection is commonly formulated as sentence-level multi-label classification over the 19 refined Schwartz values, typically predicted as independent labels. Schwartz theory, however, describes them as a circular motivational continuum, in which adjacent values are compatible and opposing values are in tension. We ask whether this structure can be operationalized as an explicit output-space geometry and used as a soft bias rather than a hard constraint. On a DeBERTa-v3-base classifier, we compare two ways of injecting it: training-time geometry-aware objectives and a post-hoc Schwartz-aware energy decoder that scores whole label sets jointly. Across five seeds, training-time geometry gives only limited gains-no larger for the true continuum than for a random ordering-whereas the decoder makes label sets more coherent with the continuum-on theory-aware coherence metrics we introduce-at no cost to Macro-F1 or Micro-F1 (held fixed by its selection rule). The gain is specific to the true Schwartz ordering: it does not appear for a random permutation or an empirical co-occurrence graph through the identical decoder. A bounded Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct diagnostic shows that supplying the continuum at inference shifts behavior but does not match supervised structured prediction. Theory-aware decoding thus offers a lightweight, controllable way to make value detection faithful to its label space.
articles.titleCn: 超越独立标签：基于施瓦茨几何解码的人类价值观检测
articles.abstractCn: 人类价值观检测通常被表述为在19种细化后的施瓦茨价值观上进行句子级别的多标签分类，这些标签通常被预测为独立的标签。然而，施瓦茨理论将它们描述为一个圆形的动机连续体，其中相邻的价值观是兼容的，而对立的价值观则存在张力。我们提出的问题是，这种结构能否被操作化为一个明确的目标空间几何形状，并用作软偏差而不是硬约束。在一个DeBERTa-v3-base分类器上，我们比较了两种注入方法：训练时的几何感知目标函数和一个后处理的施瓦茨感知能量解码器，该解码器联合评分整个标签集。在五个种子下，训练时的几何形状只能带来有限的增益——对于真实的连续体来说并不比随机排序更大——而解码器则使标签集与连续体更加一致——根据我们引入的理论感知一致性指标——并且不会影响Macro-F1或Micro-F1（由其选择规则固定）。这种增益是针对真实的施瓦茨排序的：它不会出现在随机排列或通过相同解码器的经验共现图上。一个有界的Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct诊断表明，在推理时提供连续体会改变行为，但不会匹配监督结构化预测。因此，理论感知解码提供了一种轻量级、可控的方法，使价值观检测忠实于其标签空间。

articles.title: Multi-Large Language Model Orchestrated Severity Assessment of Clinical Records (MOSAIC)
articles.abstract: Background: Disease severity is a multidimensional construct difficult to capture with rule-based approaches in Electronic Healthcare Records (EHR). Agentic large language model (LLM) systems could synthesise clinical evidence and reason over EHRs, but remain unevaluated for this task. Methods: MOSAIC is a two-phase agentic LLM framework for severity phenotyping, using type 2 diabetes (T2D) as a proof-of-concept. MOSAIC was evaluated on a synthetic cohort (SyntheticMass; open-weight N = 4,886; closed-weight N = 200) against three algorithmic ground truths (DCSI, DiSSCo, Cooper) and against all-cause mortality and incident complications. Open-weight (locally deployable) and proprietary pipelines were also compared. Results: The generated framework spanned domains absent from the comparators, including biomarker-based glycaemic staging, beta-cell function, and social determinants of health. Open-weight MOSAIC matched the proprietary pipeline (closed- vs open-weight weighted kappa = 0.773) and reached moderate agreement with Cooper (kappa = 0.597) and DCSI (kappa = 0.534) and fair agreement with DiSSCo (kappa = 0.320). Agent-based (Type 1) tiers showed significant separation of all-cause mortality (log-rank p < 0.001; crude hazard ratios 1.6-2.4 for non-Baseline tiers), with non-monotonic separation at the upper tiers, and an inverse gradient for incident complications (log-rank p < 0.001) consistent with depletion of susceptibles. Agentic classification also diverged from deterministic execution of the same rubric (MOSAIC Frozen; kappa = 0.428), indicating reasoning beyond fixed rules. Conclusion: MOSAIC shows agentic LLM systems can generate and apply clinically meaningful severity phenotypes from structured EHR data in T2D. Extending it to other diseases with similarly multidimensional severity warrants further research.
articles.titleCn: 多大型语言模型协调临床记录严重程度评估（MOSAIC）
articles.abstractCn: 背景：疾病严重程度是一个多维度的结构，基于规则的电子健康记录（EHR）方法难以捕捉。具有代理能力的通用大型语言模型（LLM）系统可以综合临床证据并在EHR上进行推理，但在此任务上的评估尚未进行。方法：MOSAIC是一个用于严重程度表型分析的、分两阶段的代理式LLM框架，以2型糖尿病（T2D）作为概念验证。MOSAIC在一个合成队列（SyntheticMass；开放权重N = 4,886；封闭权重N = 200）上进行了评估，与三种算法基准（DCSI、DiSSCo、Cooper）以及全因死亡率和新发并发症进行了比较。开放权重（本地可部署）和专有管道也进行了比较。结果：生成的框架涵盖了比较器中缺失的领域，包括基于生物标志物的血糖分期、β细胞功能和健康的社会决定因素。开放权重MOSAIC与专有管道（封闭权重与开放权重加权kappa = 0.773）匹配，并与Cooper（kappa = 0.597）和DCSI（kappa = 0.534）达到中等程度的一致性，与DiSSCo（kappa = 0.320）达到公平程度的一致性。基于代理（类型1）的层级显示出全因死亡率（对数秩p < 0.001；非基线层级的粗危险比1.6-2.4）的显著分离，在高层级上存在非单调分离，并且新发并发症呈现反向梯度（对数秩p < 0.001），这与易感者的耗尽一致。代理式分类也与同一规则的确定性执行（MOSAIC Frozen；kappa = 0.428）存在差异，表明推理超越了固定规则。结论：MOSAIC表明代理式LLM系统可以从结构化的T2D EHR数据中生成和应用具有临床意义的严重程度表型。将其扩展到其他具有类似多维严重程度的疾病值得进一步研究。

articles.title: Knowledge Knows, Verbalization Tells: Disentangling Latent Directions for Mathematical Solvability in LLMs
articles.abstract: Although LLMs have made significant progress in mathematical reasoning, determining whether a mathematical problem is solvable remains a fundamental yet challenging capability. While recent studies have probed internal representations of model solvability beliefs, verbalization has primarily been studied behaviorally rather than as an internal representation, limiting its analysis and manipulation. We address this gap by separately probing representations of solvability knowledge and verbalization, allowing us to disentangle the two within model hidden states. Across multiple LLMs, we show that knowledge and verbalization are encoded as distinct, linearly decodable representations and that fabrication is primarily associated with changes in verbalization rather than the underlying knowledge. Prompting with unsolvability cues reduces fabrication primarily by shifting verbalization, while activation steering demonstrates that these representations can be echanistically manipulated to improve model abstention.
articles.titleCn: 知识知晓，语言表达揭示：解析大型语言模型中数学可解性的潜在方向
articles.abstractCn: 尽管大型语言模型在数学推理方面取得了显著进展，但判断数学问题是否可解仍然是一项基本且具有挑战性的能力。虽然近期研究已探究模型对问题可解性的内部表征，但语言表达主要是在行为层面而非作为内部表征被研究，这限制了对其分析和操控。我们通过分别探测可解性知识和语言表达的代表，弥补了这一空白，从而能够在模型隐藏状态中分离出这两者。在多个大型语言模型中，我们表明知识和语言表达被编码为不同的、线性可解码的表征，并且捏造主要与语言表达的变化相关，而非底层知识。使用不可解性提示主要通过改变语言表达来减少捏造，而激活引导则证明这些表征可以被机制性地操控以改善模型的回避行为。

articles.title: The syntax of wh-agreement in Yemeni Ibbi Arabic
articles.abstract: This article tackles an important phenomenon in the syntax of Yemeni Ibbi Arabic (YIA), viz., wh-agreement, a phenomenon common to several languages including Greek, Indonesian, Lubukusu, Irish, etc. In YIA, wh-agreement manifests itself via agreement inflections on the Wh-Op, C, T/V, v. To account for this phenomenon, we propose an Agree across phases (AAP) approach anchored in the mechanism of Feature Inheritance (FI) in which Agree as MATCHING (AM) is a bit separated from feature valuation (FV). AM concerns Cs/vs, but FV Ts/Vs. Analyzing the agreement patterns observed between Wh-Op(erators), functional heads (precisely C, (T), v), and verbal complexes, we argue that the suffixes -eh, -uh, -nen, -um, having undergone grammaticalization process from Stannard Arabic (SA) third person pronouns, function as morphological marking of wh-agreement. Findings indicate that YIA data offer a unique empirical contribution to generative syntax, specifically concerning wh-agreement in this dialect operating via MATCHING mechanism. Our proposal straightforwardly accounts for wh-agreement cross-linguistically. This study provides further evidence that incorporating under-investigated typology provides further support for the universality of Universal Grammar (UG) by revealing how specific I-language operations reflect deeper, invariant principles of human language architecture. It concludes that the wh-agreement mechanism in YIA is more morphosyntactically robust than in languages such as Greek, Indonesian, Palauan, and Irish, providing compelling evidence for AAP as a UG approach to long-distance dependencies.
articles.titleCn: 也门伊比阿拉伯语中wh一致句法
articles.abstractCn: 本文探讨了也门伊比阿拉伯语（YIA）句法中一个重要现象——wh一致，这一现象在希腊语、印尼语、卢布库苏语、爱尔兰语等多种语言中普遍存在。在YIA中，wh一致通过Wh-算子（Wh-Op）、C、T/V、v上的屈折变化来体现。为了解释这一现象，我们提出了一个基于特征继承（FI）机制的跨阶段一致（AAP）方法，其中一致作为匹配（AM）与特征评估（FV）有所区分。AM涉及C/v，但FV涉及T/V。通过分析Wh-算子、功能头（确切地说是C、(T)、v）和动词复合体之间的一致模式，我们认为源自斯坦纳德阿拉伯语（SA）第三人称代词的词缀-e、-u、-nen、-um经历了语法化过程，作为wh一致形态标记的功能。研究结果表明，YIA语料为生成语法提供了独特的实证贡献，特别是在MATCHING机制运作的这种方言中关于wh一致方面。我们的提议直接解释了跨语言的wh一致现象。本研究进一步证明，纳入研究不足的类型学为普遍语法的普遍性提供了支持，通过揭示特定I语言操作如何反映人类语言结构的更深层次的不变原则。研究结论认为，YIA中的wh一致机制比希腊语、印尼语、帕劳语和爱尔兰语等语言更为形态句法稳固，为跨阶段一致作为普遍语法中处理长距离依赖的方法提供了有力证据。

articles.title: Train Smarter, Not Longer: Memorization-Guided Data Reuse for Efficient LLM Training

authors.name: Cong Zeng
authors.affiliation: e.g., the commonly cited four-epoch limit

articles.abstract: The training paradigm of large language models has shifted from traditional one-pass training to multi-epoch training, as reasonable reuse of limited high-quality data can improve both model performance and sample efficiency. Meanwhile, excessive repetition introduces the risk of overfitting and diminishing returns. Determining when and how to reuse data effectively thus emerges as a natural but under-explored question. Through a novel observation of model's "Memorization Window" signals derived from loss retention dynamics and downstream evaluation scores, we propose "Memorization-guided Data Reuse", a training paradigm that adaptively determines when and how data should be reused, enabling principled decisions on the number of training epochs and the scheduling of data replays. Our preliminary experiments reveal a consistent memorization-driven regime: performance continues to improve with repetition far beyond current practice (e.g., the commonly cited four-epoch limit). While a full scheduler remains future work, these insights provide a foundation for memorization-aware training schedules, helping to determine reuse budgets and move toward training LLMs smarter rather than longer with limited high-quality data.
articles.comment: Published as a paper at 3rd DATA-FM workshop @ ICLR 2026, Brazil
articles.titleCn: 更聪明地训练，而非更长时间地训练：基于记忆引导的数据重用于高效的大型语言模型训练
articles.abstractCn: 大型语言模型的训练范式已从传统的单次训练转变为多轮训练，因为合理地重用有限的高质量数据能够提升模型性能和样本效率。与此同时，过度重复会引入过拟合和收益递减的风险。因此，如何有效地重用数据，以及何时重用，成为一个自然但尚未充分探索的问题。通过观察模型从损失保持动态和下游评估分数中衍生的“记忆窗口”信号，我们提出了“记忆引导数据重用”这一训练范式，该范式能够自适应地确定何时以及如何重用数据，从而在训练轮数和数据重播调度上做出原则性决策。我们的初步实验揭示了一种持续的、由记忆驱动的机制：性能在当前实践（例如普遍引用的四轮训练限制）远超的重复次数下持续提升。虽然完整的调度器仍是未来的工作，但这些见解为记忆感知训练调度奠定了基础，有助于确定重用预算，并朝着用有限的高质量数据更智能而非更长时间地训练大型语言模型的方向发展。

articles.title: Who's Behind It? Annotating and Extracting Conspiratorial Actors from German Telegram Posts
articles.abstract: Conspiracy theories commonly attribute important events to the actions of powerful and secretive actors. While computational research has largely focused on document-level analyses of conspiracy theories, less attention has been paid to identifying the actors that drive such narratives. We develop annotation guidelines for conspiratorial actors, present a span-annotated corpus of German Telegram posts, and investigate their automatic extraction using transformer-based models. We further apply the resulting model to the \textit{Schwurbelarchiv}, a large-scale archive of German conspiracy-related Telegram channels. Our results demonstrate that conspiratorial actors can be annotated with meaningful agreement and extracted with reasonable accuracy despite the linguistic complexity of conspiracy discourse, enabling large-scale analyses of actor representations in conspiracy narratives.
articles.titleCn: 谁在背后操纵？从德国Telegram帖子中注释和提取阴谋论参与者
articles.abstractCn: 阴谋论通常将重大事件归因于强大且神秘的行动者的行为。尽管计算研究主要集中于对阴谋论进行文档层面的分析，但较少关注识别推动此类叙事的行动者。我们制定了针对阴谋论行动者的标注指南，呈现了一个包含德语Telegram帖子的跨度标注语料库，并研究了基于Transformer模型的自动提取方法。我们进一步将所得模型应用于《Schwurbelarchiv》，这是一个大规模的德语阴谋相关Telegram频道档案。我们的结果表明，尽管阴谋论话语具有语言复杂性，但阴谋论行动者仍可以被标注出具有意义的共识，并以合理的准确度进行提取，从而能够对阴谋叙事中的行动者表征进行大规模分析。

articles.title: When Words Predict Workload
articles.abstract: Standard distributed \ac{llm} schedulers rely on static token counts or rolling latency averages, making them susceptible to failures on statutorily constrained text. On \ac{epo} claims governed by Article 84 \ac{epc}, linguistic rigidity makes human and machine authorship statistically indistinguishable. Resolving this ambiguity mid-flight forces dynamic multi-model ensemble expansion, triggering unpredictable KV-cache and weight-allocation spikes that saturate consumer-grade edge GPU VRAM and cause severe \ac{oom} crashes. To prevent hardware collapse, we propose a CPU-side Linguistic Resource Forecasting (LRF) gateway. The gateway extracts a 16-dimensional text-structure vector and applies an XGBoost predictor to forecast trap-band membership. The resulting escalation probability ($\Pesc$) is evaluated against a dynamic, closed-form routing threshold ($\Tauroute(t)$) computed via real-time latency telemetry. Requests are safely routed to either a local Qwen2.5-7B edge worker or a remote contrastive ensemble (Qwen2.5 7B + 32B) on an NVIDIA H100 \emph{before} any edge GPU memory is allocated. In a 6,000-request live trial, the LRF gateway reduced the operational misroute fraction ($R_{\mathrm{mis}}$) to $0.087$--$0.095$, an order of magnitude below the token-count baseline ($0.849$). Peak edge VRAM remained safely bounded at $\SI{4.82}{\gibi\byte}$ (under the $\SI{8}{\gibi\byte}$ ceiling) across a $27\times$ variation in \ac{wan} delay. The predictor achieved a live-trial AUROC of $0.84$, and the dynamic $\Tauroute(t)$ controller yielded an $8.2\%$ relative reduction in misroutes compared to an equivalent static threshold.
articles.comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication. Permission from the author must be obtained for all uses
articles.titleCn: 当词语预测工作负荷
articles.abstractCn: 标准的分布式大型语言模型调度器依赖于静态令牌计数或滚动延迟平均值，这使得它们容易在受法规约束的文本上出现故障。根据第84条《欧洲专利公约》第5条（欧洲专利条款）的规定，语言僵化使得人类和机器作者在统计上无法区分。在飞行中解决这种歧义迫使动态多模型集成扩展，触发不可预测的KV缓存和权重分配峰值，使消费级边缘GPU显存饱和并导致严重的内存不足（OOM）崩溃。为防止硬件崩溃，我们提出了一种CPU侧语言资源预测（LRF）网关。该网关提取一个16维文本结构向量，并应用XGBoost预测器来预测陷阱带成员资格。得到的升级概率（$\Pesc$）与通过实时延迟遥测计算出的动态闭式路由阈值（$\Tauroute(t)$）进行比较。请求在分配任何边缘GPU内存之前安全地路由到本地Qwen2.5-7B边缘工作节点或NVIDIA H100上的远程对比集成（Qwen2.5 7B + 32B）。在6,000个请求的实时试验中，LRF网关将操作误路由比例（$R_{\mathrm{mis}}$）降低到0.087--0.095，比令牌计数基线（0.849）低了一个数量级。在wan延迟变化27倍的范围内，峰值边缘显存保持在4.82吉字节（在8吉字节的上限之下）安全范围内。预测器在实时试验中实现了0.84的AUROC，动态$\Tauroute(t)$控制器与等效静态阈值相比，将误路由率相对降低了8.2%。

articles.title: You Frame It: How Conceptual Representations Shape LLM Detection and Reasoning about Antisemitism
articles.abstract: LLMs enable the integration of external conceptual resources at inference time, creating new opportunities for detecting ideologically and historically complex phenomena such as antisemitism. We investigate how different forms of conceptual grounding affect antisemitism detection and explanation behavior across four state-of-the-art LLMs. Using two expert-annotated datasets, we compare definitional, fine-grained taxonomic, example-augmented, and large-context representations of antisemitism. We find that fine-grained taxonomic representations substantially improve recall, while simultaneously reducing precision. Surprisingly, supplying substantially larger conceptual resources yields no additional quantitative benefit. Post-Holocaust antisemitism poses the most persistent challenge across models and configurations. Analysis of explanations further reveals systematic limitations including overproduction of conceptual references, reliance on lexical cues, overconfidence, and difficulties with subtle or justificatory forms of antisemitism. Our findings highlight both the potential and the remaining limitations of conceptually grounded LLMs for antisemitism detection and reasoning.
articles.titleCn: 你定义它：概念表征如何塑造大型语言模型对反犹太主义的检测与推理
articles.abstractCn: 大型语言模型（LLMs）能够在推理时整合外部概念资源，为检测诸如反犹太主义等具有意识形态和历史复杂性的现象创造了新的机遇。我们研究了不同形式的概念 grounding 如何影响四种最先进 LLMs 在反犹太主义检测和解释行为上的表现。使用两个专家标注的数据集，我们比较了反犹太主义的定义性、细粒度分类、示例增强和大规模上下文表示。我们发现，细粒度分类表示显著提高了召回率，同时降低了精确率。令人惊讶的是，提供大量概念资源并未带来额外的定量效益。战后反犹太主义在所有模型和配置中都构成了最持久的挑战。对解释的分析进一步揭示了系统性限制，包括概念引用的过度生成、对词汇线索的依赖、过度自信以及难以处理微妙或辩解形式反犹太主义的问题。我们的研究突出了概念 grounding LLMs 在反犹太主义检测和推理方面的潜力和剩余局限性。

articles.title: DuplexChat: Constructing Speaker-Separated Full-Duplex Dialogue Speech at Scale for Spoken Dialogue Language Modeling
articles.abstract: Full-duplex spoken dialogue models are trained on conversational speech in which each speaker is represented as a separate stream, but existing large-scale public speech corpora are mostly monaural, making them unsuited for SDLM training. We present DuplexChat, an open-source corpus for full-duplex spoken dialogue models, and DuplexChat-Pipe, a pipeline for constructing speaker-separated full-duplex dialogue speech from public podcast feeds. DuplexChat-Pipe filters language-specific podcast feeds, retrieves and cleans episode audio, extracts diarization-guided two-speaker dialogue clips, and applies speech separation and restoration to produce one channel per speaker. Running this pipeline yields a speaker-separated spoken dialogue corpus covering 282,634 hours of English and 132,723 hours of Japanese. Analysis results on DuplexChat show that it contains turn-taking dynamics present in human dialogues.
articles.comment: 4 pages, 1 figures, submitted to SLT demo track
articles.titleCn: 双工聊天：为语音对话语言建模大规模构建说话人分离的全双工对话语音
articles.abstractCn: 全双工语音对话模型通常在对话语音上进行训练，其中每个说话者被表示为独立的流，但现有的超大规模公共语音语料库大多是单声道，不适合用于全双工语音对话模型（SDLM）的训练。我们提出了DuplexChat，这是一个用于全双工语音对话模型的开源语料库，以及DuplexChat-Pipe，这是一个从公共播客源构建说话人分离的全双工对话语音的流程。DuplexChat-Pipe会过滤特定语言的播客源，检索并清理节目音频，提取基于说话人分割的两说话人对话片段，并对语音进行分离和修复，为每个说话人生成一个声道。运行此流程产生了一个包含282,634小时英语和132,723小时日语的说话人分离语音对话语料库。对DuplexChat的分析结果表明，它包含了人类对话中存在的轮流对话动态。

articles.title: Ossetic-COT: Designing a morphologically annotated corpus and morphological analyzer for Ossetic
articles.abstract: In this work we present the first morphologically annotated corpus for Iron Ossetic that conforms to the Universal Dependencies schema. The corpus includes 5454 manually annotated sentences from the Iron Ossetic Corpus of Oral Texts, containing 74032 tokens. We use this corpus to train a BERT-based morphological analyzer. The analyzer achieves tag accuracy of 95.60%.
articles.titleCn: 奥塞梯语-COT：设计奥塞梯语的形态标注语料库和形态分析器
articles.abstractCn: 在这项工作中，我们提出了首个符合通用依赖（Universal Dependencies）模式标注形态的伊森奥塞梯语语料库。该语料库包含来自伊森奥塞梯口语文本语料库的5454个手动标注句子，共74032个词元。我们使用该语料库训练了一个基于BERT的形态分析器，该分析器达到了95.60%的标注准确率。

articles.title: Evaluating Large Language Models for Antisemitic Incident Classification
articles.abstract: Addressing hate and violence in society requires timely detection of hateful events from public reporting, but automated identification of hateful events remains underexplored. We introduce the task of hateful event detection and investigate the ability of AI systems, specifically large language models (LLMs), to discover and classify reports of antisemitic events with fine-grained labels. We evaluate OpenAI's GPT-4o and Meta's Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct on multiple expert-annotated datasets containing antisemitic event descriptions from news articles, civil society reports, and official records. We show that LLMs, particularly GPT-4o, have potential for this task, but substantial improvement is needed. Providing clear term definitions and in-context examples in prompts can improve performance: definitions are most helpful for rhetoric-oriented events (e.g. classical antisemitic tropes), while examples help label action-oriented events (e.g. physical assault). A case study of college newspapers demonstrates that LLMs can help surface relevant real-world events, supporting early monitoring and intervention. Overall, our findings highlight both opportunities and critical gaps in AI's ability to recognize complex harms and underscore the need for collaborative efforts among AI developers, policymakers, and civil society to design models, implement robust evaluation, and develop policy frameworks for defining and combating hate efficiently and effectively.
articles.comment: Accepted to Digital Hate Review 2026 Issue 1
articles.titleCn: 评估大型语言模型在反犹事件分类中的应用
articles.abstractCn: 解决社会中的仇恨与暴力问题需要及时从公众报道中识别仇恨事件，但自动化识别仇恨事件的研究仍处于探索阶段。我们引入了仇恨事件检测任务，并研究了人工智能系统，特别是大型语言模型（LLM），在发现和以细粒度标签分类反犹事件报告方面的能力。我们在包含新闻文章、民间社会报告和官方记录中的反犹事件描述的多个专家标注数据集上评估了OpenAI的GPT-4o和Meta的Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct。结果表明，LLM，尤其是GPT-4o，在这方面具有潜力，但需要大幅改进。在提示中提供清晰的术语定义和上下文示例可以提升性能：定义对以修辞为导向的事件（例如经典反犹陈词滥调）最有帮助，而示例有助于标记以行动为导向的事件（例如身体攻击）。对大学报纸的案例研究表明，LLM可以帮助揭示相关的现实事件，支持早期监测和干预。总体而言，我们的研究突出了人工智能在识别复杂危害方面的机遇与关键差距，并强调了人工智能开发者、政策制定者和民间社会之间需要协作设计模型、实施稳健评估以及制定政策框架，以高效有效地定义和打击仇恨。

articles.title: Semantic Homogenization in Italian Popular Music: A Diachronic Analysis
articles.abstract: In recent years, studies have revealed a decline in semantic variety across popular music lyrics, particularly in English-language songs on streaming platforms like Spotify. This research examines whether a similar trend can be observed in a different linguistic and cultural context: the lyrics of all finalist songs from the 75 editions of the Sanremo Music Festival, Italy's most renowned music competition. What sets this work apart is the development of a flexible and efficient methodology for tracking changes in semantic similarity over time, which can be applied to different datasets to study similar phenomena. Drawing on a combination of full-text, segment-based, topic-based, and word-level analyses, the approach leverages both embedding techniques and large language models. When applied to the Sanremo corpus, this framework reveals a gradual move toward increasing semantic uniformity, echoing the global patterns identified in previous studies. These findings underscore the value of natural language processing tools in uncovering long-term shifts in musical language and cultural expression.
articles.titleCn: 意大利流行音乐中的语义同质化：历时分析
articles.abstractCn: 近年来，研究表明流行音乐歌词中的语义多样性正在下降，尤其是在Spotify等流媒体平台上的英文歌曲中。本研究考察了在另一种语言和文化背景下是否也存在类似趋势：意大利最著名的音乐竞赛——圣雷莫音乐节75届所有决赛歌曲的歌词。这项工作的独特之处在于开发了一种灵活高效的方法，用于追踪语义相似度随时间的变化，该方法可应用于不同数据集以研究类似现象。结合全文、分段、主题和词级分析，该方法利用了嵌入技术和大型语言模型。应用于圣雷莫语料库时，该框架揭示了一种逐渐向语义趋同发展的趋势，呼应了先前研究中发现的全球模式。这些发现突显了自然语言处理工具在揭示音乐语言和文化表达长期变化方面的价值。

articles.title: Evaluating the Effect of Linguistic Relatedness on Cross-Lingual Transfer in Large Multilingual Automatic Speech Recognition
articles.abstract: Extending automatic speech recognition (ASR) to low-resource African languages is constrained by the prohibitive demands of data collection at scale. A promising direction is to leverage linguistic relatedness to enhance cross-lingual transfer from a related auxiliary language to the low-resource target by sequentially adapting on both. Although this strategy has shown meaningful improvements in small ASR models, its effectiveness in large ASR remains unclear. We extend this framework to large multilingual ASR through a systematic controlled experimental design spanning six factors, two Africa-centric corpora, and four large ASR models, isolating whether linguistic relatedness reliably predicts cross-lingual transfer gains in this setting. Across all conditions, pre-adaptation on related auxiliary languages yields no practically meaningful transfer improvements given minimal target-language data, suggesting that linguistic relatedness alone may not reliably predict cross-lingual transfer gains in large multilingual ASR, or constitute an effective strategy for extending such models to low-resource languages.
articles.titleCn: 评估语言亲缘性对多语言自动语音识别跨语言迁移的影响
articles.abstractCn: 将自动语音识别（ASR）扩展到资源匮乏的非洲语言受到大规模数据收集的高昂要求的限制。一个有前景的方向是利用语言相关性，通过在相关辅助语言和低资源目标语言上依次进行适应性调整，来增强跨语言迁移。尽管这种策略在小型ASR模型中显示出有意义的改进，但其在大型ASR中的有效性尚不明确。我们通过一项涵盖六个因素、两个以非洲为中心的语料库和四个大型ASR模型的系统化受控实验设计，扩展了这一框架，以确定语言相关性是否在这种环境下可靠地预测跨语言迁移收益。在所有条件下，在相关辅助语言上进行预适应性调整，在目标语言数据极少的情况下并未带来实际意义上的迁移改进，这表明仅凭语言相关性可能无法在大型多语言ASR中可靠地预测跨语言迁移收益，或者不能构成一种有效的策略来将此类模型扩展到低资源语言。

articles.title: Multi-Turn On-Policy Distillation with Prefix Replay
articles.abstract: We study on-policy distillation (OPD) for agentic tasks, where an LLM agent interacts with an environment over multiple turns and a student imitates a teacher over these multi-turn interaction histories. Fully online OPD is costly because each update requires fresh student rollouts through the environment and teacher queries at visited histories. We propose Replayed-Prefix On-Policy Distillation (ReOPD), an off-environment alternative that reuses pre-collected teacher trajectories as replayed prefixes: the student acts at selected steps, while the teacher provides dense per-step supervision without executing new environment interactions. We show that multi-turn OPD introduces a prefix trap: making histories more student-on-policy improves relevance to the student, but can query the teacher on histories where its target is unreliable. This creates a two-sided distribution shift between student occupancy and teacher reliability. ReOPD addresses this by treating multi-turn OPD as a reliability-aware prefix distribution design and implements it with a simple step-decaying sampling schedule that emphasizes early, lower-shift prefixes. Across mathematical reasoning with Python and search environments over multiple teacher and student model scales, ReOPD preserves or improves OPD-level accuracy, uses zero tool calls during student training, and is at least 4$\times$ faster per training step than OPD. ReOPD therefore turns expensive agent-environment interaction into a reusable offline resource, enabling scalable distillation across tools, tasks, and environments.
articles.titleCn: 多回合在线策略蒸馏与前缀重放
articles.abstractCn: 我们研究了用于自主任务的在线策略蒸馏（OPD），其中大型语言模型（LLM）代理在多轮中与环境交互，学生通过这些多轮交互历史模仿教师。完全在线的OPD成本高昂，因为每次更新都需要通过环境进行新的学生部署，并在访问过的历史记录中进行教师查询。我们提出了重放前缀在线策略蒸馏（ReOPD），这是一种环境外替代方案，它重用预先收集的教师轨迹作为重放前缀：学生在选定的步骤中行动，而教师在不执行新的环境交互的情况下提供密集的每步监督。我们表明，多轮OPD引入了前缀陷阱：使历史记录更符合学生策略可以提高与学生的相关性，但可能会在教师目标不可靠的历史记录上进行查询。这造成了学生占用率和教师可靠性之间的双向分布偏移。ReOPD通过将多轮OPD视为可靠性感知的前缀分布设计来解决这一问题，并使用简单的步长衰减采样计划来实现，该计划强调早期、低偏移前缀。在Python数学推理和跨多个教师和学生模型尺度的搜索环境中，ReOPD保持了或提高了OPD级别的准确性，在学生训练期间使用零工具调用，并且每步训练至少比OPD快4倍。因此，ReOPD将昂贵的代理-环境交互转化为可重复使用的离线资源，从而实现了跨工具、任务和环境的可扩展蒸馏。

articles.title: LP-SFT: Local-Preserving Supervised Fine-Tuning via Multimodal Entropy Structure
articles.abstract: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is the standard approach for adapting pretrained language models to downstream domains, yet it often improves target-domain behavior at the cost of degrading pre-existing capabilities. Standard cross-entropy fine-tuning promotes only the observed label token and leaves unconstrained how probability mass is redistributed over other plausible alternatives, potentially distorting the rich local preference structure learned during pretraining. We first analyze next-token predictions using Shannon and Renyi entropies, revealing that pretrained models exhibit a regular multimodal entropy structure. These entropy peaks correspond to varying numbers of plausible alternatives, indicating that the base model intrinsically encodes rich distributional knowledge beyond the single supervised token. Motivated by this observation, we propose LP-SFT, a Local-Preserving Supervised Fine-Tuning objective designed to explicitly protect this inherent entropy structure. At each step, LP-SFT constructs an adaptive support of alternative tokens and applies a locally normalized preservation loss to maintain the base model's relative structure among them, while standard cross-entropy independently optimizes the supervised token. Across mixed-domain and single-domain fine-tuning experiments, LP-SFT improves overall performance over vanilla SFT and recent SFT-enhancement baselines, achieving the best balance between pass@1 accuracy and pass@k performance. These results suggest that local preservation helps mitigate capability degradation without collapsing sampling-accessible diversity.
articles.comment: 21 pages, 3 figures. Code is available at https://github.com/Wakaka161/LP-SFT
articles.titleCn: 基于多模态熵结构的局部保持监督微调：LP-SFT
articles.abstractCn: 监督微调（SFT）是适配预训练语言模型到下游领域的标准方法，但它往往以牺牲现有能力为代价来提升目标领域的行为。标准的交叉熵微调仅促进观察到的标签token，而未约束概率质量在其他合理替代方案上的重新分配，可能扭曲预训练期间学习到的丰富局部偏好结构。我们首先使用香农和雷尼熵分析下一token的预测，揭示预训练模型表现出规律的多模态熵结构。这些熵峰值对应于不同数量的合理替代方案，表明基础模型本质上编码了超越单个监督token的丰富分布知识。基于这一观察，我们提出了LP-SFT，一种局部保留监督微调目标，旨在显式保护这种固有熵结构。在每个步骤中，LP-SFT构建一个自适应的替代token支持集，并应用局部归一化保留损失来维持基础模型在它们之间的相对结构，同时标准的交叉熵独立优化监督token。在混合领域和单一领域微调实验中，LP-SFT在整体性能上优于基础SFT和最近的SFT增强基线，实现了在pass@1准确率和pass@k性能之间的最佳平衡。这些结果表明，局部保留有助于缓解能力退化，而不会导致采样可访问的多样性崩溃。

articles.title: Turning Off-Policy Tokens On-Policy: A Plug-in Approach for Improving LLM Alignment
articles.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training for large language models (LLMs) follows a efficient paradigm of "rollout then update", which inevitably results in off-policy training data. To resolve this, Importance sampling (IS) is proposed, while the token-level ratios compound over long sequences, causing severe variance exploded. A natural idea is "transferring" these off-policy token into on-policy token, so that the importance scores for correction are unnecessary. Following this idea, we propose Selective Importance Sampling (SIS), which is inspired by rejection sampling. Concretely, SIS implements by viewing off-policy model as proposal distribution, and implement a token-level rejection test: accepted tokens are viewed as on-policy, so that receive unit importance score, while rejected tokens retain the standard IS correction. Our proposed SIS is theoretically proved reducing the gap between token-level and sequence-level off-policy gradient estimators. The SIS acts as a plug-in that only modifies the importance ratio in the policy loss, adding negligible wall-clock overhead, and can be combine with a vast vary of RL post-training algorithms. Experiments on dense and MoE LLMs across math and agent benchmarks show that SIS consistently improves all objectives, while providing substantially stronger robustness under off-policy data.
articles.titleCn: 离线策略令牌在线策略：一种用于改进大型语言模型对齐的插件方法
articles.abstractCn: 大型语言模型（LLM）的强化学习（RL）后训练遵循一种高效的“先执行后更新”范式，这不可避免地会导致离策略训练数据。为解决这个问题，提出了重要性采样（IS），但标记级别的比例在长序列中累积，导致方差急剧增大。一个自然的想法是将这些离策略标记“迁移”为策略标记，从而无需进行修正的重要性分数。基于这一想法，我们提出了选择性重要性采样（SIS），该方法是受拒绝采样的启发。具体而言，SIS通过将离策略模型视为提议分布，并实施标记级别的拒绝测试来实现：被接受的标记被视为策略标记，从而获得单位重要性分数，而拒绝的标记则保留标准的IS修正。我们提出的SIS在理论上被证明能够减少标记级别和序列级别离策略梯度估计之间的差距。SIS作为一个插件，仅修改策略损失中的重要性比率，增加了可忽略的系统开销，并且可以与各种RL后训练算法结合使用。在数学和智能体基准测试中的密集型和MoE LLM实验表明，SIS始终如一地提高了所有目标，同时在离策略数据下提供了显著更强的鲁棒性。

articles.title: What You See Is What You Get: Observation-Aligned Supervision for Chart-to-Code Generation
articles.abstract: Chart-to-code generation is commonly trained with supervised fine-tuning on reference plotting scripts, implicitly treating the gold code as a fully observable target. We argue that this assumption is often invalid: many chart programs contain latent raw variables that cannot be uniquely recovered from the rendered image. For example, a boxplot exposes summary statistics rather than original samples, a pie chart reveals proportions rather than arbitrary raw values, and a histogram shows bin-level mass rather than individual observations. Supervising models to reproduce such non-identifiable quantities encourages hallucination and over-specified code generation. We introduce Observation-Aligned supervision, a rewriting framework that replaces latent raw-data targets with quantities constrained by the visual observation: box statistics for boxplots, wedge percentages for pie charts, and bin weights for histograms. Applying this framework to chart-to-code training data from two sources, we obtain the Observation-Aligned supervision target data. Experiments across multiple VLMs on ChartMimic and ChartX demonstrate consistent improvements in observable value recovery, including under both-executable evaluation. Our results suggest that improving chart-to-code models requires not only more data or advanced learning objectives or algorithms, but also supervision targets that respect what is identifiable from the chart image.
articles.titleCn: 所见即所得：面向图表到代码生成的观测对齐监督
articles.abstractCn: 图表到代码的生成通常通过参考绘图脚本的监督微调进行训练，隐式地将黄金代码视为一个完全可观察的目标。我们认为这一假设往往无效：许多图表程序包含无法从渲染图像中唯一恢复的潜在原始变量。例如，箱线图展示汇总统计数据而非原始样本，饼图揭示比例而非任意原始值，直方图显示桶级质量而非个体观测值。监督模型复制此类不可识别的量会助长幻觉和过度指定的代码生成。我们引入了观察对齐监督，这是一个重写框架，用受视觉观察约束的量替换潜在原始数据目标：箱线图的箱统计量、饼图的楔形百分比和直方图的桶权重。应用该框架到来自两个来源的图表到代码训练数据，我们获得了观察对齐监督目标数据。在ChartMimic和ChartX上对多个VLM进行实验，在可观察值恢复方面（包括在可执行评估下）均显示出持续改进。我们的结果表明，改进图表到代码模型不仅需要更多数据或更先进的学习目标或算法，还需要尊重图表图像中可识别内容的监督目标。

articles.title: PAST-TIDE: Prototype-Anchored Statement Tuning with Topic-Invariant Normalization for Stance Detection
articles.abstract: We introduce PAST-TIDE, our stance detection system addressing both subtasks of the StanceNakba Shared Task at NakbaNLP@LREC-COLING 2026. The main idea is statement tuning. We redefine stance as cloze-style masked language modeling (MLM), letting a verbalizer map label words to stance categories through the pre-trained MLM head rather than appending a randomly initialized classification head. We complement this with prototypical contrastive learning, which uses learnable class prototypes for batch-size independent contrastive training, and topic-conditional layer normalization for cross-topic Arabic stance detection. PAST-TIDE achieves macro-F1 scores of 0.75 for Subtask A and 0.74 for Subtask B on the official leaderboard, indicating that minimal architectural additions to a pre-trained model can remain competitive in low-resource settings.
