articles.comment: Published in The Fifteenth Language Resources and Evaluation Conference (LREC 2026)
articles.titleCn: PAST-TIDE：基于原型锚定语句调优与主题不变归一化的立场检测
articles.abstractCn: 我们介绍了PAST-TIDE，这是我们针对NakbaNLP@LREC-COLING 2026中StanceNakba共享任务的立场检测系统。主要思路是陈述调优。我们将立场重新定义为完形填空式的掩码语言建模（MLM），让一个语言生成器通过预训练的MLM头将标签词映射到立场类别，而不是附加一个随机初始化的分类头。我们补充了原型对比学习，该学习使用可学习的类原型进行批次大小独立的对比训练，以及主题条件层归一化用于跨主题阿拉伯立场检测。PAST-TIDE在官方排行榜上Subtask A和Subtask B的宏观F1得分分别为0.75和0.74，表明对预训练模型的最小架构添加可以在低资源环境下保持竞争力。

articles.title: URSA: Chemistry-Aware Benchmark for Utilitarian Retrosynthesis Assessment
articles.abstract: Synthesis planning aiming to find pathways of reactions for a target molecule is one of the most important and challenging tasks in drug discovery. Recent progress has produced both specialized deep-learning retrosynthesis systems and general-purpose large language models, but objective comparison remains difficult due to the lack of flexible, chemically interpretable benchmarking protocols. In the current study, we are introducing the URSA (Utilitarian RetroSynthesis Assessment) evaluation framework that provides the opportunity to benchmark the synthetic routes not only from a formal perspective, such as convergence to commercially available starting materials, but also from a chemical plausibility perspective, mimicking the way expert chemists evaluate the reactions and routes. The study covers a comprehensive evaluation of both conventional end-to-end retrosynthesis solutions and LLMs for the synthesis planning task on a set of novel, diverse target molecules with undisclosed synthetic routes, which represent realistic tasks in the daily drug design routine. We find that while LLMs can support high-level strategic planning, they currently underperform specialized retrosynthesis models in reliably solving synthesis planning tasks.
articles.titleCn: URSA：面向功利性逆合成评估的化学感知基准
articles.abstractCn: 旨在寻找目标分子反应路径的合成规划是药物发现中最重要且最具挑战性的任务之一。近年来，虽然出现了专门用于逆合成分析的深度学习系统以及通用的大型语言模型，但由于缺乏灵活且化学可解释的基准测试协议，客观比较仍然困难。在本研究中，我们引入了URSA（功利主义逆合成评估）评估框架，该框架不仅从正式角度（如收敛到市售起始原料）对合成路线进行基准测试，还从化学合理性角度进行评估，模拟专家化学家评价反应和路线的方式。该研究对一系列具有未知合成路线的新颖、多样化的目标分子进行了传统端到端逆合成解决方案和大型语言模型在合成规划任务上的全面评估，这些任务代表了日常药物设计中的实际挑战。我们发现，虽然大型语言模型可以支持高级战略规划，但它们目前在可靠解决合成规划任务方面仍落后于专门的逆合成模型。

articles.title: ToolFailBench: Diagnosing Tool-Use Failures in LLM Agents
articles.abstract: Tool calling is central to modern language model agents, but aggregate benchmark scores often hide where tool use fails. A model that never calls a needed tool and a model that calls the tool but ignores the result can look similar under final task accuracy. We introduce ToolFailBench, a diagnostic benchmark for measuring tool-use failures across 1,000 tasks in finance, medicine, law, cybersecurity, and real estate. Tool-required tasks return values the model wouldn't guess, forcing it to trust the tool while control tasks attach the same tools but should be answered directly. We label each trace with Tool-Skip, Result-Ignore, Output-Fabrication, and Unnecessary-Tool-Use, using a rule classifier and two LLM judges aggregated by majority vote. Across 19 headline models, the best reaches 86.33% Clean Tool-Use Rate, showing that faithful tool use is not saturated. More importantly, models with similar aggregate scores fail in different ways: most stay disciplined on no-tool controls, while Llama-3.1 models show an Always-Call pattern, and at the same parameter scale Llama-3.1-70B and Qwen2.5-72B differ by 89 percentage points on control-task accuracy. Tool-use evaluation should measure not only whether agents call tools, but whether they use tool outputs correctly and avoid tools when none is needed.
articles.comment: 18 pages, 3 figures. Published at the Workshop on Agents in the Wild: Safety, Security, and Beyond (AIWILD) and the Workshop on Failure Modes of Agentic AI (FAGEN) at ICML 2026
articles.titleCn: ToolFailBench：诊断大型语言模型代理中的工具使用失败
articles.abstractCn: 工具调用是现代语言模型代理的核心，但综合基准分数往往掩盖了工具使用的失败之处。一个从不调用所需工具的模型和一个调用工具但忽视结果的模型，在最终任务准确率上可能看起来相似。我们引入了ToolFailBench，一个用于衡量金融、医疗、法律、网络安全和房地产领域1000个任务中工具使用失败的诊断基准。需要工具的任务会返回模型无法猜测的值，迫使模型信任工具，而控制任务则附加相同的工具但应直接回答。我们使用规则分类器和两个LLM裁判（通过多数投票汇总）为每个追踪记录标注Tool-Skip、Result-Ignore、Output-Fabrication和Unnecessary-Tool-Use。在19个主要模型中，最佳模型的清洁工具使用率达到86.33%，表明忠实工具使用尚未饱和。更重要的是，综合分数相似的模型以不同方式失败：大多数模型在无工具控制任务上保持纪律性，而Llama-3.1模型表现出Always-Call模式，在相同参数规模下，Llama-3.1-70B和Qwen2.5-72B在控制任务准确率上相差89个百分点。工具使用评估不仅应衡量代理是否调用工具，还应评估它们是否正确使用工具输出并避免在不需要时使用工具。

articles.title: Does It Fail to See or Fail to Know? Attributing Errors in Vision-Language Models
articles.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) perform well on visual question answering with high-quality images but struggle when questions require knowledge beyond what is clearly and directly visible. In such settings, uncertainty quantification should not only indicate whether the model is likely to fail but also diagnose why it is uncertain, across dimensions such as perception, entity recognition, and knowledge retrieval. While prior work has focused on individual failure modes in isolation or treated incorrect answers as monolithic failures, we propose a unified framework for disentangling these failure modes and investigate whether pre-generation signals can predict these failure sources. Across a range of datasets and model families, we find a consistent pattern in VLM errors: some failures arise from visual or recognition bottlenecks, while others persist after the relevant entity is identified. Our main finding is that these failure sources can be predicted before decoding: recognition-related failures are best captured by visual-token representations, while failures that remain after recognition are better captured by prompt-conditioned hidden states. This pre-generation signal enables efficient failure-source prediction before the model produces an answer, allowing uncertain cases to be routed to targeted interventions such as image repair, entity recognition support, or external retrieval.
articles.titleCn: 它是否是看不到还是不知道？视觉语言模型中的错误归因
articles.abstractCn: 视觉语言模型（VLMs）在高质量图像的视觉问答任务中表现良好，但当问题需要超越清晰直接可见范围的知识时，它们会面临挑战。在这种情况下，不确定性量化不仅要表明模型可能失败，还要诊断其不确定性的原因，涵盖感知、实体识别和知识检索等维度。尽管以往研究集中于孤立的单个失败模式或将错误答案视为整体性失败，我们提出了一种统一框架来解耦这些失败模式，并探究预生成信号是否可以预测这些失败来源。在一系列数据集和模型家族中，我们发现VLM错误存在一种一致模式：部分失败源于视觉或识别瓶颈，而另一些失败则发生在相关实体被识别之后。我们的主要发现是，这些失败来源可以在解码前被预测：与识别相关的失败最好由视觉标记表示捕捉，而识别后仍存在的失败则更适合由提示条件隐藏状态捕捉。这种预生成信号能够在模型生成答案前进行高效的失败来源预测，使不确定情况能够被路由到针对性的干预措施，如图像修复、实体识别支持或外部检索。

articles.title: FormalRx: Rectify and eXamine Semantic Failures in Autoformalization
articles.abstract: The veracious semantic alignment in autoformalization is significant for formal mathematical reasoning. However, existing evaluations provide only opaque binary verdicts or scalar scores, offering no interpretable insight into where or why translations fail. This opacity severely limits both human understanding and automated system improvement. To bridge this gap, we introduce FormalRx, a comprehensive diagnostic evaluation framework that transforms autoformalization assessment from black-box judgments into actionable feedback. At its core is SCI Error Taxonomy, a hierarchical classification scheme decomposing autoformalization errors into 28 distinct categories with strict priority ordering. Building on this taxonomy, FormalRx provides four critical diagnostic capabilities: alignment verdicts, error categorization, error localization, and correction. We instantiate the framework with a diagnostic model FormalRx-8B, trained on 56,287 NL-FL pairs with fine-grained diagnostic annotations, and release FormalRx-Test as the first fine-grained diagnostic benchmark. FormalRx-8B achieves F1-scores of 0.88 (verdict) and 0.71 (categorization), along with accuracies of 0.75 (localization) and 0.73 (correction), substantially outperforming both general-purpose LLMs and specialized baselines. By connecting evaluation with actionable insights, FormalRx enables systematic diagnosis and improvement of autoformalization systems.
articles.comment: 44 pages, 5 figures. Accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
articles.titleCn: FormalRx：纠正并检查自动形式化中的语义错误
articles.abstractCn: 在自动形式化过程中，精确的语义对齐对于形式化数学推理至关重要。然而，现有的评估方法仅提供不透明的二元判定或标量分数，无法提供有关翻译失败位置或原因的可解释见解。这种不透明性严重限制了人类理解和自动化系统改进。为弥补这一差距，我们引入了FormalRx，这是一个全面的诊断评估框架，将自动形式化评估从黑盒判断转变为可操作的反馈。其核心是SCI错误分类体系，这是一种分层分类方案，将自动形式化错误分解为28个不同的类别，并具有严格的优先级排序。基于此分类体系，FormalRx提供了四种关键的诊断能力：对齐判定、错误分类、错误定位和纠正。我们使用FormalRx-8B诊断模型实例化该框架，该模型在56,287对NL-FL数据对上进行了细粒度诊断标注的训练，并发布FormalRx-Test作为首个细粒度诊断基准。FormalRx-8B实现了0.88（判定）和0.71（分类）的F1分数，以及0.75（定位）和0.73（纠正）的准确率，显著优于通用LLM和专门基线。通过将评估与可操作的见解相结合，FormalRx能够实现自动形式化系统的系统诊断和改进。

articles.title: Retroactive Chain-of-Thought (RetroCoT): Forensic Reconstruction Prompts as a Safety Diagnostic Across Model Generations
articles.abstract: Safety alignment in large language models is typically evaluated against direct, imperative harmful requests. We show that this alignment is highly conditioned on pragmatic register: models that refuse a direct request frequently comply when the same underlying objective is expressed through a different communicative stance. This suggests that current alignment policies are not invariant to semantic equivalence, but remain sensitive to how a request is pragmatically framed. We introduce Retroactive Chain-of-Thought (RetroCoT), a single-turn attack that reframes harmful requests as forensic reconstruction tasks. Rather than requesting harmful instructions directly, RetroCoT presupposes that the harmful outcome has already occurred and asks the model, acting as a forensic analyst, to reconstruct in reverse the causal chain that produced it. On AdvBench (n=50), RetroCoT achieves attach success rate of 58% on gpt-4o and 52% on gpt-4o-mini, compared with direct-request baselines of 0% and 4%, respectively. We further identify a pronounced generation gap: GPT-5-family models refuse RetroCoT entirely, explicitly identifying the reconstruction premise in their refusal rationales, consistent with explicit coverage of this reconstruction register. However, this robustness does not generalize across pragmatic forms. A single adversarial feedback turn presenting an existing forensic reconstruction response alongside evaluator critique raises ASR from 0% to 48% on GPT-5.4-mini and from 58% to 94% on GPT-4o; a control condition omitting the fabricated low score achieves 85% on GPT-5.4-mini, indicating that the operative element is pragmatic continuation within the established forensic frame rather than score manipulation. These results suggest that frontier-model alignment remains conditioned on pragmatic framing rather than semantic intent, and that new pragmatic registers can continue to expose a...
articles.titleCn: 逆向思维链 (RetroCoT)：跨模型代际的安全诊断法——法医学重建提示
articles.abstractCn: 大型语言模型的安全对齐通常通过与直接的、命令式的有害请求进行评估。我们表明，这种对齐高度依赖于语用语体：拒绝直接请求的模型在以不同交际立场表达相同潜在目标时，却经常予以配合。这表明当前的对齐政策对语义等价性并不具有不变性，而是仍然对请求的语用框架敏感。我们引入了回顾性思维链（RetroCoT），这是一种单轮攻击，将有害请求重新框架化为法医重建任务。RetroCoT并非直接请求有害指令，而是预设有害后果已经发生，并要求模型扮演法医分析师的角色，反向重建产生该后果的因果链。在AdvBench（n=50）上，RetroCoT在gpt-4o上实现了58%的攻击成功率，在gpt-4o-mini上实现了52%，而直接请求基线的成功率分别为0%和4%。我们进一步发现了一个显著的生成差距：GPT-5系列模型完全拒绝RetroCoT，并在拒绝理由中明确指出重建前提，这与重建语体的明确覆盖一致。然而，这种鲁棒性并不适用于不同的语用形式。一次对抗性反馈轮，在提供现有的法医重建响应并附上评估者批评的情况下，将GPT-5.4-mini的ASR从0%提高到48%，将GPT-4o从58%提高到94%；而省略了虚构的低分控制条件在GPT-5.4-mini上达到了85%，这表明起作用的是在既定的法医框架内的语用延续，而非分数操纵。这些结果表明，前沿模型的对齐仍然依赖于语用框架而非语义意图，并且新的语用语体可以继续暴露……

articles.title: Wrong Before Right: Late Rescue and Interface Failure in Aligned Language Models
articles.abstract: We study how correctness is assembled inside aligned language models, not only whether the final answer is right. Using layer-wise difference-in-differences (DiD) trajectories over polarity-controlled minimal pairs, we identify the wrong-dip: in mid layers (25-90% depth), internal preference transiently commits to the incorrect answer and is rescued only by late-layer correction. We verify this causally with patchscope-style activation transplantation across 17 models, three families, and 64x scale (0.5B-32B). Four findings follow. (1) Alignment amplification of the causal wrong-dip is recipe-specific and emergent: it emerges at 3B in Qwen2.5, remains high, and peaks at 32B (paired t up to 9.7), reverses in Llama-3-8B (t=-2.31), and sits between for Mistral-7B. (2) The dip predicts real compression failures: high-dip items are 3-7x more likely to flip under late-layer low-rank compression, block dropping, or structured pruning, while quantization flips are dip-blind, a double dissociation confirmed by late-layer ablation. (3) The dip is trainable: a LoRA fine-tune with a mid-layer wrong-margin penalty matches output-only SFT accuracy while cutting the causal dip by 67-70% and improving compression robustness; output-only SFT worsens the causal dip by up to 2.8x at perfect surface accuracy. (4) With controlled readouts, the phenomenon survives natural-language I/O: dip stratification of structural-damage failures is significant on naturalistic vignettes, and free-form fragility separates into a dip-auditable late-rescue layer and a dip-blind interface layer. Together, output-level correctness can hide a late-rescue process that governs compression risk, post-training quality, and evaluation distortion.
articles.comment: 16 pages, 10 figures. Code to be released
articles.titleCn: 错误先于正确：对齐语言模型的后期救援和接口失败
articles.abstractCn: 我们研究对齐语言模型内部正确性是如何构建的，而不仅仅是最终答案是否正确。通过使用极性控制的最小对在分层差异-差异（DiD）轨迹上，我们识别出了“错误下沉”：在中间层（25%-90%深度），内部偏好会暂时选择错误答案，并且只有通过深层层的纠正才能得到挽救。我们通过跨17个模型、3个系列和64倍规模（0.5B-32B）的patchscope风格激活移植，对这一因果关系进行了验证。以下是四个发现。（1）因果错误下沉的对齐放大是特定配方且有涌现性的：它在Qwen2.5的3B时出现，保持较高水平，并在32B达到峰值（配对t值高达9.7），在Llama-3-8B中逆转（t=-2.31），而Mistral-7B则介于两者之间。（2）该下沉可以预测实际的压缩失败：高下沉项在深层低秩压缩、阻塞丢弃或结构化剪枝下翻转的可能性是3-7倍，而量化翻转则不受下沉影响，这一双重分离通过深层层消融实验得到证实。（3）该下沉是可训练的：带有中间层错误边缘惩罚的LoRA微调可以匹配仅输出SFT的准确率，同时将因果关系下沉减少67-70%，并提高压缩鲁棒性；而仅输出的SFT在完美表面准确率下会使因果关系下沉恶化高达2.8倍。（4）通过控制读出，该现象在自然语言输入输出中依然存在：结构损伤失败的下沉分层在自然文本片段上具有显著意义，而自由形式的脆弱性则分为一个可审计的深层挽救层和一个不受下沉影响的接口层。总而言之，输出级别的正确性可能隐藏了一个深层挽救过程，该过程控制着压缩风险、训练后质量和评估扭曲。

articles.title: CARD: Cross-component Audio Representation Distillation for Encoder-Free Audio Captioning
articles.abstract: Modern automated audio captioning systems pair a frozen audio encoder with a large language model (LLM) via a trainable projector, incurring the encoder's inference cost and bottlenecking the model through its fixed acoustic features. We present CARD, an encoder-free audio captioning model that removes the encoder at inference: a 13.2M projector feeds a frozen LLM with merged LoRA adapters, while the teacher used to train it is discarded. CARD distills a pretrained audio teacher (CLAP-HTSAT) into the model, but rather than injecting it into the LLM alone, it routes the teacher's representations across components: perceptual stages to the projector and semantic stages to the LLM. This placement improves CIDEr-D by +12.18 over an LLM-only distilled model on AudioCaps and by +5.21 on Clotho, reaching 55.4 against a 66.4 encoder-kept upper bound with no encoder at inference, showing that where a teacher's knowledge is placed matters as much as its presence.
articles.titleCn: 卡片：跨组件音频表征蒸馏用于无编码器音频描述
articles.abstractCn: 现代自动音频字幕系统通过可训练投影器将冻结的音频编码器与大语言模型（LLM）配对，这既带来了编码器的推理成本，又通过其固定的声学特征限制了模型。我们提出了CARD，一种无需编码器的音频字幕模型，在推理时移除了编码器：一个13.2M的投影器为冻结的LLM提供合并的LoRA适配器，而用于训练它的教师模型则被舍弃。CARD将预训练的音频教师（CLAP-HTSAT）蒸馏到模型中，但并非仅将其注入LLM，而是将教师的表示路由到各个组件：感知阶段路由到投影器，语义阶段路由到LLM。这种布局在AudioCaps上使CIDEr-D提升了+12.18，在Clotho上提升了+5.21，达到了55.4，而无需编码器推理的上限为66.4，这表明教师知识的位置与其实际存在同等重要。

articles.title: Do All Visual Tokens Matter Equally? Object-Evidence Preserving Token Merging for Vision-Language Retrieval
articles.abstract: Multi-vector vision-language retrieval preserves fine-grained visual evidence through maximum-similarity late interaction, but dense image-side tokens make storage and scoring expensive. Existing token compression methods reduce this cost, yet they can remove or collapse object- and region-level evidence that future query tokens may need to select. We propose SaMer, an object-aware token merging framework that compresses image-side post-projector tokens into $K$ representative centroids while preserving the original late-interaction interface. SaMer uses object annotations only during training as a merge prior to discourage cross-instance mixing, requires no ground-truth bounding boxes or detectors at inference time, and adapts only the shared projection layer with frozen vision and language backbones. With $K=64$, SaMer removes more than 93% of image-side tokens and reduces ColPali storage by $16.09\times$, while improving R@1 on Flickr30K and MSCOCO. These gains arise because object-aware merging preserves query-selectable object evidence that pruning or feature-only pooling can remove or collapse. SaMer also outperforms compression baselines and shows stronger phrase-level grounding, suggesting that efficient multi-vector retrieval depends not only on reducing token count, but on preserving the evidence future query tokens need to select.
articles.titleCn: 所有视觉标记是否同等重要？面向视觉-语言检索的对象证据保留标记合并
articles.abstractCn: 多向量视觉语言检索通过最大相似度晚期交互保留细粒度视觉证据，但密集图像侧的token使得存储和评分成本高昂。现有的token压缩方法降低了这种成本，但它们可能会移除或压缩未来查询token可能需要选择的物体和区域级证据。我们提出了SaMer，一个基于物体的token合并框架，它将图像侧的投影器token压缩成$K$个代表性中心点，同时保留原始的晚期交互接口。SaMer仅在训练期间使用物体标注作为合并先验来阻止跨实例混合，在推理时无需真实边界框或检测器，并且仅调整共享投影层，同时冻结视觉和语言主干网络。当$K=64$时，SaMer移除了超过93%的图像侧token，并将ColPali存储量减少了$16.09$倍，同时提高了Flickr30K和MSCOCO上的R@1。这些收益源于基于物体的合并保留了查询可选择的对象证据，而剪枝或仅特征池化可能会移除或压缩这些证据。SaMer还优于压缩基线，并展现出更强的短语级定位能力，表明高效的多向量检索不仅依赖于减少token数量，还依赖于保留未来查询token需要选择的证据。

articles.title: MTEB-PT: A Text Embedding Benchmark for Brazilian Portuguese
articles.abstract: Text embeddings for Portuguese have no dedicated benchmark: evaluation rests on translated corpora such as English MS MARCO or on thin multilingual coverage, with native tasks scattered and unconsolidated. We introduce MTEB-PT, a benchmark of 22 native Brazilian-Portuguese tasks across seven categories (classification, multilabel classification, pair classification, semantic textual similarity, clustering, retrieval, and reranking), admitting only data created or found in Portuguese and excluding translations by construction. We evaluate 93 models spanning 23M to 27B parameters: 73 open-weight and 20 closed commercial APIs. Alongside the leaderboard we report a statistical layer for every headline comparison: per-task bootstrap confidence intervals, paired-bootstrap significance, a task- and instance-level discrimination analysis (how sharply each task separates models) adapted from Item Response Theory, and a cross-leaderboard correlation. Three findings stand out. The benchmark cleanly separates about a dozen tiers of models, though the top six are statistically too close to order. An openly licensed, self-hostable model reaches that leading tier, so strong Portuguese embedding quality does not require a commercial API. And a model's rank on the global multilingual leaderboard predicts its Portuguese rank only moderately (Spearman rho = 0.75 over 55 shared models; one model ranks 3rd there and 49th here), so a native benchmark measures something the multilingual boards do not. We release every task, our code, and a public leaderboard, so practitioners can choose Portuguese embedding models on native evidence.
articles.comment: 18 pages, 5 figures, 7 tables. Code (Apache-2.0): https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21087217 . Results dataset (CC-BY-4.0): https://doi.org/10.57967/hf/9377 . Leaderboard: https://huggingface.co/spaces/mteb-pt/leaderboard
articles.titleCn: MTEB-PT：葡萄牙语（巴西）文本嵌入基准测试
articles.abstractCn: 葡萄牙语文本嵌入目前没有专门的基准测试：评估依赖于翻译语料库，如英语MS MARCO，或基于薄弱的多语言覆盖，原生任务分散且未整合。我们引入了MTEB-PT，一个包含22项巴西葡萄牙语原生任务的基准，涵盖七个类别（分类、多标签分类、配对分类、语义文本相似度、聚类、检索和重新排序），仅接受在葡萄牙语中创建或发现的数据，并构建性地排除翻译。我们评估了93个模型，参数范围从23M到27B：73个开放权重模型和20个闭源商业API。除了排行榜外，我们还为每个主要比较报告了统计层：每项任务的引导置信区间、配对引导显著性、基于项目反应理论的任务和实例级区分分析（每个任务如何清晰地区分模型），以及跨排行榜的相关性。三个发现尤为突出。基准清晰地分离了大约十几个模型的层级，尽管前六名在统计上过于接近而无法排序。一个开源许可、可自托管的模型达到了领先层级，因此强大的葡萄牙语嵌入质量并不需要商业API。一个模型在全球多语言排行榜上的排名只能适度预测其在葡萄牙语排行榜上的排名（55个共享模型中Spearman rho为0.75；一个模型在全球排名第3，在此排名第49），因此原生基准衡量了多语言排行榜无法衡量的东西。我们发布了所有任务、我们的代码和公共排行榜，以便从业者基于原生证据选择葡萄牙语嵌入模型。

articles.title: Progressive Disclosure for LLM-Maintained Wiki Knowledge Bases: a Preregistered Ablation
articles.abstract: LLM agents increasingly answer questions against knowledge bases they help maintain. A common intuition holds that progressive disclosure, a compact catalog plus a one-line summary per page so the agent loads only what it needs, should make this cheaper than consulting a large monolithic index. We test that on a real 709-page markdown wiki maintained by an LLM. We retrofit it for progressive disclosure and run a preregistered ablation in which four versions of the corpus differ only in how the agent reaches the content: page bodies are byte-identical across arms, frozen as immutable git tags, so any measured difference is due to access structure alone. We cross the arms with three access conditions (a protocol-constrained agent, a free self-routing agent, and a catalog-preload regime) and grade answers blind against verified gold references with a cross-family judge. A pilot upended the premise: a capable tool-using agent never loads the index, inferring a page's path from the question and reading it directly, so the specific saving the retrofit targets does not materialize. We therefore made answer quality primary and cost secondary. Quality is non-inferior (the retrieval arm matches the index baseline within the preregistered margin) while cost falls in every regime, from about a third for a self-routing agent to well over half under catalog-preload, all confidence intervals excluding zero. The saving comes not from avoiding the index load but from more targeted access: the retrieval arm cites fewer pages and takes fewer tool turns. The study doubles as a case study in evaluation validity, applying threat-to-validity discipline to the tooling that produced it.
articles.comment: 14 pages, 2 figures, 6 tables. Preregistered on OSF (https://osf.io/feka7, DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/FEKA7). Materials-availability and deviations described in the paper
articles.titleCn: 面向大语言模型维护的维基知识库的渐进式披露：一项预先注册的消融研究
articles.abstractCn: LLM代理越来越多地根据它们所维护的知识库来回答问题。一种普遍的直觉认为，渐进式披露——即每页提供一个简洁的目录和一行摘要，让代理仅加载所需内容——应该比查询庞大的单一索引更经济。我们在一个由LLM维护的709页Markdown维基百科上测试了这一观点。我们对其进行渐进式披露改造，并运行了一个预先注册的消融实验，其中四个语料库版本仅在代理获取内容的方式上有所不同：各分支的页面正文字节完全相同，作为不可变的Git标签冻结，因此任何测量到的差异都仅归因于访问结构。我们将这些分支与三种访问条件（受协议约束的代理、自由自路由代理和目录预加载机制）进行交叉，并使用跨家族评委对答案进行盲法评分，对照已验证的金标准。一个初步实验颠覆了这一前提：一个功能强大的工具使用代理从不加载索引，而是根据问题推断页面路径并直接读取，因此改造旨在节省的具体成本并未实现。因此，我们将答案质量作为首要目标，成本作为次要目标。质量表现非劣（检索分支在预先注册的误差范围内与索引基线匹配），而成本在所有机制中都下降，从自路由代理的约三分之一到目录预加载机制超过一半，所有置信区间均不包含零。节省并非来自避免索引加载，而是来自更精准的访问：检索分支引用的页面更少，工具调用次数也更少。这项研究同时也是一个关于评估有效性的案例研究，将威胁到有效性的原则应用于生成它的工具。

articles.title: Characterizing the Temporal, Emotional, and Social Patterns of Adolescent Substance Use Discussions on Reddit
articles.abstract: Adolescence is a critical developmental period marked by heightened emotional sensitivity, social stress, and vulnerability to substance use. However, traditional research methods provide limited access to adolescents' authentic experiences, hindering efforts to develop evidence-based prevention and intervention strategies. Social media provides a unique opportunity to observe adolescents' naturally occurring discussions about substance use, offering valuable insights into their opinions, emotions, and lived experiences that can inform early prevention and intervention strategies. In this study, we analyze large-scale Reddit discussions related to substance use among adolescents between 2018 and 2023. Leveraging hour-by-day temporal analysis, sentiment and emotion classification, and transformer-based topic modeling (BERTopic), we examine the interaction between time, emotion, and semantic content in adolescent substance use discourse. Our findings reveal pronounced weekend and late-night peaks in substance-related discussions, a dominance of negative emotions such as sadness and fear, and distinct semantic topics centered on peer relationships, family conflict, emotional distress, and substance-specific experiences. These findings advance our understanding of adolescent substance use in naturalistic online settings and provide empirical evidence to support the development of more timely, targeted, and evidence-based prevention and intervention strategies.
articles.titleCn: 描述Reddit上青少年药物使用讨论的时序、情感和社会模式
articles.abstractCn: 青春期是一个关键的发展阶段，其特点是情绪敏感性增强、社会压力增大以及对物质使用的易感性。然而，传统研究方法难以获取青少年的真实体验，阻碍了基于证据的预防和干预策略的开发。社交媒体提供了一个独特的机会，可以观察青少年关于物质使用的自然讨论，从而深入了解他们的观点、情绪和实际经历，为早期预防和干预策略提供有价值的见解。在本研究中，我们分析了2018年至2023年间与青少年物质使用相关的Reddit大规模讨论。通过采用按日逐时的时序分析、情感和情绪分类以及基于transformer的主题建模（BERTopic），我们考察了青少年物质使用讨论中时间、情绪和语义内容之间的相互作用。我们的研究发现，与物质相关的讨论在周末和深夜达到显著峰值，悲伤和恐惧等负面情绪占主导地位，并且存在以同伴关系、家庭冲突、情绪困扰和特定物质体验为中心的明确语义主题。这些发现加深了我们对青少年在自然在线环境中物质使用的理解，并为开发更及时、更有针对性、基于证据的预防和干预策略提供了实证依据。

articles.title: Fidelity-Diversity Metrics for Text
articles.abstract: As language modeling technology matures, there is an increasing research focus on the composition and curation of datasets used to train these models. For instance, practitioners commonly seek to augment high-quality datasets with additional text to enhance the performance of models trained on that data. However, informed decisions about data augmentation require more nuanced assessments about data quality. We build on work measuring the precision and recall of generative models to develop a pair of metrics that quantify (1) fidelity, capturing how closely candidate text resembles reference data, and (2) diversity, capturing how well it covers the modes of the reference dataset. Our metrics are based on optimal transport divergence functionals between discrete text summaries. In experiments on M2D2 text datasets, we show that these metrics are able to disentangle a lack of fidelity from a lack of diversity in deficient candidate text. In further experiments, our metrics detect diversity deficits in synthetic GSM8K-style math datasets, which correlate with degradations in downstream accuracy of language models finetuned on this synthetic data.
articles.titleCn: 文本的保真度-多样性指标
articles.abstractCn: 随着语言建模技术的成熟，越来越多的研究关注用于训练这些模型的数组的构成和策展。例如，从业者通常寻求用额外文本来增强高质量数据集，以提高在该数据上训练的模型的性能。然而，关于数据增强的知情决策需要更细致的数据质量评估。我们基于测量生成模型精确度和召回率的工作，开发了一对量化（1）保真度（捕捉候选文本与参考数据相似的程度）和（2）多样性（捕捉其覆盖参考数据集模式的程度）的指标。我们的指标基于离散文本摘要之间的最优传输散度泛函。在M2D2文本数据集上的实验表明，这些指标能够将缺陷候选文本中保真度不足与多样性不足区分开来。在进一步的实验中，我们的指标检测到合成GSM8K风格数学数据集中的多样性缺陷，这些缺陷与在合成数据上微调的语言模型的下游准确率下降相关。

articles.title: Can temporal article-level credibility signals improve domain-level credibility prediction?
articles.abstract: Web domain credibility evaluation is vital for combating misinformation. It is conducted by examining factors such as domain type, transparency, and overall reputation. However, assessing the credibility of newly emerging web domains remains challenging since they have no reputation yet. Expert fact-checkers evaluate the credibility of domains by analyzing the content of their articles, including the presence of misinformation, bias, or propaganda. Yet, the ease of large-scale content generation enabled by LLMs has accelerated the creation of new content, rendering manual assessment insufficient and underscoring the need for automated approaches to domain credibility evaluation. In this paper, we introduce our Domain Credibility Evaluation Framework (DCEF), a temporal framework for domain credibility evaluation grounded in expert ratings. DCEF enables us to investigate whether the credibility of web domains can be assessed from their published articles following the workflow of expert fact-checkers, without any prior knowledge of the source domains themselves.
articles.titleCn: 时间维度下文章级别的可信度信号能否提升领域级别的可信度预测？
articles.abstractCn: 网络域名可信度评估对于打击虚假信息至关重要。该评估通过考察域名类型、透明度和整体声誉等因素进行。然而，评估新兴网络域名的可信度仍然具有挑战性，因为它们尚未建立声誉。专家事实核查员通过分析其文章内容来评估域名的可信度，包括虚假信息、偏见或宣传的存在。然而，LLM（大型语言模型）带来的大规模内容生成便利性加速了新内容的创作，使得人工评估不足，凸显了自动化域名可信度评估方法的需求。在本文中，我们介绍了我们的域名可信度评估框架（DCEF），这是一个基于专家评分的时序域名可信度评估框架。DCEF使我们能够研究是否可以通过专家事实核查员的评估流程，从网络域名的已发布文章中评估其可信度，而无需对源域名本身有任何先验知识。

articles.title: EEG-SpikeAgent: Agentic Closed-Loop Program Synthesis for Automated EEG Spike Detection
articles.abstract: Automated detection of interictal epileptiform discharges in scalp electroencephalography (EEG) is clinically important, but recent high-performing deep-learning models often trade interpretability for accuracy. We introduce EEG-SpikeAgent, a closed-loop program-synthesis framework that uses a large language model (LLM) agentic system to generate signal-processing features for spike detection in scalp EEG. The system iteratively proposes one deterministic EEG feature module at a time, executes the resulting code on EEG to generate tabular features, evaluates performance via a tabular classifier, summarizes run-level metrics, and feeds structured diagnostics back to the model for refinement. Across iterations, EEG-SpikeAgent proposes and refines candidate signal features and decision rules informed by model performance. We evaluated EEG-SpikeAgent on VEPISET, a public 29-channel dataset of 4-second epochs containing 2,516 discharge-containing and 22,933 non-discharge epochs. Across five-fold cross-validation with a gradient-boosted tree classifier, agent-generated features achieved an area under the receiver operating characteristic curve of 0.935, balanced accuracy of 0.699, F1 score of 0.557, sensitivity of 0.401, and specificity of 0.996 at the default operating point. At an operating point with sensitivity 0.80, mean precision was 0.470 and mean specificity was 0.900. Artifact-aware feature generation improved balanced accuracy and F1 score over spike-only feature search. These results indicate that LLM-based program synthesis can automate EEG feature engineering in auditable and inspectable code-driven manner for clinical and methodological review.
articles.titleCn: EEG-SpikeAgent：用于自动脑电 spike 检测的智能闭环程序合成
articles.abstractCn: 头皮脑电图（EEG）中癫痫间期放电的自动检测在临床上具有重要意义，但近年来高性能的深度学习模型往往以牺牲可解释性为代价来换取准确性。我们介绍了EEG-SpikeAgent，这是一个闭环程序合成框架，它利用大型语言模型（LLM）的智能体系统来生成头皮EEG中尖峰检测的信号处理特征。该系统迭代地提出一个确定性EEG特征模块，在EEG上执行生成的代码以生成表格特征，通过表格分类器评估性能，总结运行级指标，并将结构化诊断反馈给模型以进行优化。在迭代过程中，EEG-SpikeAgent根据模型性能提出并优化候选信号特征和决策规则。我们在VEPISET数据集上评估了EEG-SpikeAgent，这是一个包含29个通道、4秒 epoch的公共数据集，其中包含2,516个含放电epoch和22,933个不含放电epoch。在五折交叉验证和梯度提升树分类器下，智能体生成的特征在默认操作点实现了受试者工作特征曲线下面积为0.935、平衡准确率为0.699、F1分数为0.557、灵敏度为0.401和特异度为0.996。在灵敏度为0.80的操作点，平均精确率为0.470，平均特异率为0.900。基于伪影感知的特征生成比仅尖峰特征搜索提高了平衡准确率和F1分数。这些结果表明，基于LLM的程序合成可以在可审计和可检查的代码驱动方式下自动进行EEG特征工程，以供临床和方法学审查。
